theme: 面试谈薪，千万别踩这个坑

lines.en: Salary negotiation mistake number one: being the first to disclose a specific dollar amount.
lines.zh: 薪资谈判的首要错误： 率先 透露具体的薪资数额。

lines.en: You, of course, want to be obliging in the interview process, but in this particular instance, go ahead and flip that question back to the interviewer.
lines.zh: 在面试过程中，你当然想表现得热情随和， 但在这种特定情况下， 尽管 把这个问题反问回 面试官。

lines.en: So, let's take a look at a real-world example here. Let's say an employer is doing initial phone screening with you, and you're asked, "What are you looking for for pay?"
lines.zh: 那么，我们来看一个 真实示例。 假设雇主正在对你进行 初步的电话面试， 问你：“您对薪资有何预期要求？”

lines.en: Now, you can go ahead and just respond with something as simple as, "It's so early in the process that I'm still learning what the role and responsibilities are, so my expectations are flexible at the moment.
lines.zh: 此时，你可以直接简单地回答： “现在流程还处于初期，我还在了解这个岗位的职责， 所以目前我的薪资期望是 灵活可商量的。

lines.en: Plus, there are many other considerations that I make when it comes to joining a new company beyond pay."
lines.zh: 另外，在加入一家新公司时，除了薪酬，我还会考虑很多其他因素。”

lines.en: But flip then question to them and say, "What have you budgeted for the role?"
lines.zh: 然后把问题反抛给他们，问： “你们为这个岗位 预算了多少薪资？”

lines.en: Before I work out, I'm quickly hydrating myself.
lines.zh: 锻炼前， 我先快速 补充点水分。

lines.en: I have been feeling like everyone around me is getting sick with the fall weathers.
lines.zh: 我总感觉周围的人都在生病， 随着 秋天天气转凉。

lines.en: I had a little bit of sniffles too last week. Let's go.
lines.zh: 我上周也有点 流鼻涕。 我们开始吧。

lines.en: Before I do anything, I will always grab my foam roller and stretch.
lines.zh: 在做任何运动前， 我都会先拿过我的 泡沫轴 拉伸一下。

lines.en: I actually have a few videos on my app as well, but I have been doing this for so long that I know exactly where my pain points are.
lines.zh: 其实我的App里也有几个教学视频， 但我已经练了这么久，所以我完全清楚自己的 痛点 在哪里。

lines.en: It really helps align my body, so when I do the training after, I'm actually able to activate the right muscles,
lines.zh: 这真的有助于 让我的身体更协调， 这样在之后的训练中， 我才能够 激活正确的肌肉，

lines.en: and it also gets rid of any knots and tension I have, so it's amazing for recovery.
lines.zh: 并且它还能消除我身上的 肌肉结块和紧张感， 所以对 身体恢复 非常棒。

lines.en: I need to redo my nails, this hand still looks pretty good, we got a little chip in here.
lines.zh: 我需要重新做下指甲， 这只手看起来保持得还不错， 只是这里有一点 剥落。

lines.en: This hand, this whole nail peeled off.
lines.zh: 这只手呢， 整个美甲都 掉下来了。

lines.en: I'm thinking we'll do pink chrome, I feel like that could be cute, something a little fun and a little less time-consuming than doing French tips.
lines.zh: 我在想我们可以做个粉色镀铬美甲， 感觉会很可爱， 比较有趣，而且比做法式 省时间。

lines.en: And also I want to do a face mask later but that is low on the to-do list like I'll just do it tonight if I have time.
lines.zh: 稍后我还想敷个面膜， 但这在我的待办清单里 优先级不高， 也就是如果晚上有空的话我才会做。

lines.en: And I also want to clean my makeup brushes and clean out my makeup bag like I'll probably just throw it in with my laundry.
lines.zh: 我还想 洗一下化妆刷和清理一下化妆包， 我大概会直接把它们和脏衣服一起丢进洗衣机。

lines.en: Here is the jewelry for today, this adorable Pearl bow necklace and these earrings.
lines.zh: 这是今天的首饰， 这条 超可爱的珍珠蝴蝶结项链 和这些耳环。

lines.en: Now that my jewelry is all on let's put my hair up so it's out of the way.
lines.zh: 现在首饰都戴好了， 让我们 把头发扎起来， 这样就 不会碍事了。

lines.en: We are kind of in the mood for some pasta, but we don't have a clue where to go.
lines.zh: 我们有点 想吃 意大利面， 但我们完全 不知道该去哪儿。

lines.en: And I'm not sure if we're even going to get a table anywhere. And it's Saturday night.
lines.zh: 而且我不确定我们还能不能在餐厅 等到位子。 毕竟今天是周六晚上。

lines.en: I don't know if we're screwed. Maybe. But I hope that there will be some restaurants that have like walk-ins.
lines.zh: 我不知道我们会不会 搞砸了（吃不上饭了）。 也许吧。 但我希望能有些餐厅接受 未预约直接进店的散客。

lines.en: Okay, guys, we're ready. So Mattha is looking slay in these pink pants and these very chunky and funky shoes.
lines.zh: 好了各位，我们准备出门了。 Mattha 穿这条粉裤子简直 美爆了（绝杀），还有这双非常 时髦的厚底 鞋。

lines.en: That's my favorite jumper ever. And they are just so handy.
lines.zh: 这是我最喜欢的套头针织衫。 它们真的非常 好穿（百搭/实用）。

lines.en: It's like a really warm, but still quite lightweight layer because they're 100% cashmere.
lines.zh: 它是一层非常保暖， 但又相当 轻薄的衣物， 因为材质是100%纯羊绒的。

lines.en: They still have that kind of warmth but without being a really big chunky, sort of cable-knit jumper.
lines.zh: 它们保暖性很好， 但又不像那种非常厚重宽大的， 绞花针织 毛衣。

lines.en: So you can just kind of pop these on underneath anything.
lines.zh: 你可以直接把它 套在任何衣服里面。

lines.en: They do them in so many different colors. I now have them in cream, black, navy, gray. They're just like timeless, honestly, being an absolute staple in my wardrobe this year.
lines.zh: 有很多不同的颜色。 我现在有奶油色、黑色、海军蓝、灰色。 老实说，它们就像是 永不过时 的款式， 绝对是我今年衣橱里的 必备核心单品。

lines.en: They just go with everything, and I feel like they look put together, but they're so easy to just throw on. They go with jeans, they go with anything.
lines.zh: 它们和什么都很搭， 我觉得穿上显得 很得体（精心打扮过）， 但同时又非常容易 随手套上出门。 它们搭牛仔裤也行，搭配任何衣服都行。

theme: 沉浸式开箱与酒店Room Tour

lines.en: I actually want to unpack my suitcase for, like, the first time ever and put my stuff in the wardrobe and hang some stuff up.
lines.zh: 我真的破天荒第一次这么想 打开行李箱把东西拿出来， 放进衣柜里，把一些东西挂起来。

lines.en: Because I'll be here for four nights. So, I just don't really feel like living out of my carry-on suitcase.
lines.zh: 因为我要在这里住四晚。 所以，我真的不想 一直从随身行李箱里翻找东西度日。

lines.en: But first, let's do a hotel room tour.
lines.zh: 但首先，我们来个 酒店房间大揭秘。

lines.en: Starting off here is the door when you first walk in. And then this is a water filter.
lines.zh: 首先，这是一走进来时的门。 然后这是一个 滤水器。

lines.en: We've got this full-body mirror. Then, we have this sliding door and this is the bathroom.
lines.zh: 这里有面 全身镜。 然后是这扇推拉门，里面是浴室。

lines.en: This massive freaking shower.
lines.zh: 这个花洒简直 大得夸张。

lines.en: When you hear the word pleasure, what pops into your mind?
lines.zh: 当听到“快乐（愉悦）”这个词时， 你脑海中会 浮现 什么？

lines.en: For me, it's the feeling of sitting by the pool on a sunny day reading a good book.
lines.zh: 对我来说，是在阳光明媚的日子里坐在泳池边 读一本好书 的感觉。

lines.en: There is no better feeling. But then, pleasure evolved into something entirely different over the years.
lines.zh: 没有比这更好的感觉了。 然而，随着时间推移，快乐的含义已经 演变得完全不同了。

lines.en: It was no longer about indulging in these feel-good moments, but something I wanted to feel all the time
lines.zh: 它不再是 沉浸在这些令人愉悦的时刻， 而是变成一种我无时无刻不想感受的东西，

lines.en: and it created some bad habits: doomscrolling on social media, checking for notifications, online shopping or online browsing.
lines.zh: 这也衍生出了一些坏习惯： 比如在社交媒体上 无节制地狂刷负面信息， 查看消息通知， 网络购物或随意浏览。

lines.en: It's not the pleasure that I was after, but it's a cheap dopamine that's accessible to me at any time. Maybe our brains are wired to always seek pleasure.
lines.zh: 这其实并不是我所追求的快乐， 而是一种随时随地都能获取的 廉价多巴胺。 也许我们的大脑天生就渴望一直追寻快乐。

theme: 松弛感旅行与省钱妙招

lines.en: We took a flight from Madrid to Milan, and then hopped on a train to Venice.
lines.zh: 我们先从马德里飞往米兰，然后 跳上火车 去威尼斯。

lines.en: It was actually much more affordable to fly into Milan versus flying into Venice directly.
lines.zh: 实际上，飞到米兰要 划算得多 而不是直飞威尼斯。

lines.en: So we just took a train from Milan, which was fairly easy to navigate.
lines.zh: 所以我们就从米兰搭火车，交通 相当方便。

lines.en: We booked business class tickets for the train, which in my opinion were worth it.
lines.zh: 我们订了火车商务舱的票，我觉得这钱 花得非常值。

lines.en: I think it was only an additional 10 or 15 Euro, but it was so spacious and made the trip so much more comfortable.
lines.zh: 我记得只多花了10或15欧元，但空间非常 宽敞，让旅行更加舒适。

lines.en: On my hunt to find coffee we stumbled across this bar cafe and they had just taken this right out of the oven and it looked so good.
lines.zh: 在 寻觅咖啡店的过程中 我们 偶然发现了这家酒吧咖啡馆，他们刚把烤好的披萨从烤箱拿出来，看起来太美味了。

lines.en: I don’t use foundation, I just use this concealer.
lines.zh: 我不用粉底液，我只用这款 遮瑕膏。

lines.en: I put this on any like redness or spots around my nose. This is like an exact skin tone match.
lines.zh: 我会把它涂在鼻周泛红或有瑕疵的地方。这和我的肤色 完美匹配。

lines.en: You can probably not even see where I’m putting it because it is almost identical to my skin tone.
lines.zh: 你可能根本看不出我涂在了哪里 因为它和我的肤色 几乎一模一样。

lines.en: And then I take a brush. This is a flat head brush and I kind of like just blend it out everywhere.
lines.zh: 然后我拿出一把刷子。这是一把 平头刷 我会把它均匀推开。

lines.en: This is just how I even out my skin tone rather than using a foundation.
lines.zh: 这就是我 均匀肤色 的方法 而不是用粉底液。

lines.en: It’s just the best under-eye concealer I’ve ever used. It covers up my dark circles so much.
lines.zh: 这是我用过的 最好的眼下遮瑕。它 能很好地遮盖我的黑眼圈。

lines.en: I have pretty defined creases under my eyes, and it covers them and it doesn’t crease as long as you set it.
lines.zh: 我眼下有比较 明显的细纹，它能遮住 而且 只要定好妆就不会卡纹。

lines.en: Right after I do that, before it creases, I take this triangular powder puff and use this Huda Beauty powder. I don’t know what shade it is, and I pack it in under my eyes a little bit.
lines.zh: 上完遮瑕还没卡纹之前，我会用这个 三角形粉扑 和这款Huda Beauty散粉。我不知道散粉的色号，我会取一点粉 轻轻按压在眼下。

lines.en: The next thing I always do before a trip is scope out restaurants and make reservations in advance,
lines.zh: 旅行前我总是做的下一件事 就是 物色餐厅 并 提前预订，

lines.en: because there is nothing worse than walking 20,000 steps around a city all day, finishing around dinner time and realizing no restaurants anywhere have tables available.
lines.zh: 因为 没有比这更糟的事了：在城里暴走一整天两万步，挨到晚饭时间，却发现哪家餐厅都没空位了。

lines.en: It is no fun to be hangry and scrambling to find somewhere to eat after a long day of sightseeing.
lines.zh: 游览一天后，饿得 饥肠辘辘又暴躁（hangry, a combination of hungry and angry） 又 手忙脚乱地找地方吃饭 可不是什么愉快的事。

lines.en: So making a reservation keeps things a lot more relaxed.
lines.zh: 所以，提前订好餐厅 能让一切变得 轻松从容很多。

lines.en: Not that finding a little hole in the wall spot that doesn't take reservations can't be a great experience as well.
lines.zh: 这并不是说，找那种不接受预订的 苍蝇小馆（不起眼的小店） 就不会有好的体验。

lines.en: But it is kind of hit-and-miss. So now I try to make at least one reservation for a trip so I know I'm guaranteed a good dining experience.
lines.zh: 但这有点 碰运气（时好时坏）。所以我现在每次旅行都尽量至少预订一家餐厅 这样我就能 确保有一次愉快的用餐体验。

lines.en: I can say for certain that the stories and messages you’ve shared have enriched my life.
lines.zh: 我可以 肯定地说 你们分享的故事和信息 丰富了我的生活。

lines.en: I have enjoyed it very much,
lines.zh: 我 非常喜欢它，

lines.en: but have also observed how easy it is for social media to fuel a sense of inadequacy and comparison.
lines.zh: 但也注意到社交媒体多么容易 助长匮乏感和攀比心理。

lines.en: I also found that with social media it is easy to project your own dissatisfaction or insecurity onto other people,
lines.zh: 我还发现，在社交媒体上 很容易将自己的 不满或不安全感投射到其他人身上，

lines.en: instead of empowering yourself to embrace who you are and that everyone’s timeline is different.
lines.zh: 而不是 赋予自己力量去接纳真实的自己 并明白每个人的成长轨迹都是不同的。

lines.en: In the last year or so, I've really started to intentionally focus on the traits and talents I already have,
lines.zh: 在 过去的一年左右，我真的开始 有意专注于 我已经拥有的特质和才能，

lines.en: instead of trying to fit a square peg into a round hole.
lines.zh: 而不是试图 削足适履（把方钉硬塞进圆孔里）。

lines.en: I used to look anywhere but at what I already have. I used to be so impressionable.
lines.zh: 过去我总是 四处寻觅，却偏偏不看自己已经拥有的一切。我以前很容易 受他人影响。

lines.en: This focusing on the talents I already have, I treated them like my North Star.
lines.zh: 这种对已有才能的关注，我把它们当作我的 北极星（指路明灯）。

lines.en: And it really ended up being one of the most self-loving things I've ever done.
lines.zh: 这最终真的 成为了 我做过的最 爱自己的事 之一。

lines.en: And with that, I started to feel like I was going with the current.
lines.zh: 随之而来的是，我开始感觉自己像在 顺流而下（顺应自然）。

lines.en: I wasn't constantly fighting something and pushing to change or fix what was never even broken in the first place.
lines.zh: 我不再不停地与某种东西作斗争 也不再逼着自己去改变或修复 那些一开始根本就没有损坏的东西。

theme: 晨间自我准备的仪式感

lines.en: The next thing I have, this is more of a day-to-day thing, it's presenting yourself and preparing yourself for the day, whatever that means to you.
lines.zh: 我接下来要说的，这更像是 一件日常小事，那就是 对外呈现自己，为新的一天做好准备，无论这对你意味着什么。

lines.en: I find even if I'm running errands, I'm not seeing anyone that day, or if I'm just staying in my room all day,
lines.zh: 我发现，即使我只是 出门跑腿办事，那天不见任何人，或是 整天都呆在房间里，

lines.en: sometimes I'll just throw on a little concealer, a really cute sweat set.
lines.zh: 有时候我也会 随手涂 一点遮瑕，穿一套超可爱的 运动套装。

lines.en: No one's gonna see me, and I know that, but that's not the point.
lines.zh: 没有人会看到我，我心里清楚，但 那不是重点。

lines.en: The point is really just to make me feel better for the day ahead by getting a little bit ready, throwing on some gold hoop earrings.
lines.zh: 重点真的只是为了 让我接下来的一天感觉更好 稍微准备一下，戴上一些金色圆圈耳环。

lines.en: I've been lucky enough to be able to be a bit more nomadic this year and been spending a lot more time in Europe.
lines.zh: 今年我很 幸运能过上稍微游牧（旅居）一点的生活 并在欧洲待了较长的一段时间。

lines.en: And I feel like I have such a great appreciation for the European way of living and viewing summer as opposed to the New York City way.
lines.zh: 我感觉我 非常欣赏 欧洲人的生活方式以及对待夏天的态度 而不是（与...截然不同） 纽约式的生活方式。

lines.en: I'm truly so over that hustle grind culture.
lines.zh: 我真的是 受够了那种拼命内卷（奔波劳碌）的文化。

lines.en: I feel like a lot of this year has been uncovering the beauty of like enjoying the simple moments, the slow moments, the long dinners, the walks in nature with friends,
lines.zh: 我觉得今年很多时候都在 发掘一种美，比如享受简单的时刻，慢节奏的时光，悠长的晚餐，和朋友在大自然中散步，

lines.en: which I appreciate all the little moments. On that note, I think I'm ready for some coffee. Let's go get some coffee.
lines.zh: 我很 珍视所有这些微小的瞬间。说到这里，我觉得可以喝杯咖啡了。我们喝咖啡去吧。

lines.en: Since then I've learned quite a few lessons on how to cultivate a feeling of abundance while living simply.
lines.zh: 从那时起 我 学到了不少经验，关于如何在简单生活的同时 滋养富足感。

lines.en: When I moved here without any plans to move or travel again in the future, it was a cathartic experience in which I had to redefine what it was to live a meaningful life.
lines.zh: 当我搬到这里 并且未来没有任何搬家或旅行的计划时，这是一次 净化心灵（释放情绪）的体验，在这个过程中，我不得不 重新定义何为有意义的生活。

lines.en: True fulfillment doesn't come from the acquisition of material things. I find there is no easy cure for sadness.
lines.zh: 真正的 满足感 并不来源于 物质的获取。悲伤并没有简单的解药。

lines.en: Instead, I find that to cultivate joy, you must treat it like a seed.
lines.zh: 相反，我发现要想 培养快乐的情绪，你必须 像对待一颗种子一样对待它。

lines.en: You must take care of it and let it grow and watch over it.
lines.zh: 你必须 细心呵护它，让它生长，并时刻关注它的成长。

lines.en: I am gonna try and start this year every morning with a gratitude journal entry.
lines.zh: 今年，我打算 尝试每天早上都以 写感恩日记开始。

lines.en: I really just want to write about things that I'm grateful for before I start manifesting and I created a vision board all last night, so I'll show you guys that in a minute.
lines.zh: 我只是非常想在开始 显化（愿望） 之前 写一些我感激的事情 昨晚我花了一整晚做了一个 愿景板，待会儿给你们看看。

lines.en: I also just got this for Christmas. It's lavender pillow mist. I've been wanting to try this for so long.
lines.zh: 我还在圣诞节收到了这个。这是 薰衣草枕头喷雾。我 一直都想试试这款产品。

lines.en: I think it's going to help so much with my sleep.
lines.zh: 我觉得它会对我的睡眠 帮助很大。

lines.en: But I forgot to spray it on last night, so I just did it this morning and it should set the mood for a calming journaling experience this morning.
lines.zh: 但我昨晚忘了喷了，所以今天早上才喷，这应该能 为今早的平静写日记体验营造氛围。

lines.en: So I'm going to get changed. I have to wear, like, kind of “scrappy” clothes today because apparently this thing I'm doing is quite messy.
lines.zh: 我要去 换衣服了。今天我必须穿那种 “破旧/邋遢”一点的衣服 因为显然我要干的这活儿挺脏乱的。

lines.en: So, I'm wearing like an old shirt and old jeans. That's the vibe.
lines.zh: 所以，我就穿了件旧衬衫和旧牛仔裤。就是 这种感觉（风格）。

lines.en: I'm really just a sucker for buying things at a reduced price. This was down from £6 to £3.
lines.zh: 我真的 无法抗拒（对...毫无免疫力） 买 打折的 东西。这件衣服从 6 镑降到了 3 镑。

lines.en: Some fluffy gloves because they were a pound. You always need gloves and I always end up having one scattering around the place and I can never find the other.
lines.zh: 还买了一些 毛茸茸的手套，因为才 1 镑。手套总是需要的，而我总是 弄得其中一只到处乱丢 然后永远找不到另一只。

lines.en: That's what I bought. Nothing major.
lines.zh: 这就是我买的东西。没什么大不了的（日常小采购）。

lines.en: Guys, I feel like my hair has actually been a little bit less greasy recently.
lines.zh: 家人们，最近感觉我的头发确实 没那么油了。

lines.en: If you guys follow me on TikTok, then you might have seen me talk about it.
lines.zh: 如果你们有 关注我的TikTok 的话，那么你们可能看过我聊这件事。

lines.en: I'll shower one day, and then the next day, honestly, even like 12 hours later, it gets greasy again.
lines.zh: 我一天洗一次澡，第二天，老实说，甚至大约12小时后，头发就又会 变油。

lines.en: So, I've been kind of trying to phase out of it and push it to like every other day, and I do feel like my hair has been a bit less greasy.
lines.zh: 所以，我一直试着 逐步摆脱 这种习惯，并把它推迟到 隔一天洗一次，我确实觉得头发稍微没那么油了。

lines.en: Some of you guys in the comments on TikTok were telling me to like trim my hair, and that kind of helps.
lines.zh: 一些在TikTok评论区的粉丝 建议我 修剪一下头发，这似乎也 有点帮助。

lines.en: I need to go through my makeup bag like immediately.
lines.zh: 我需要 立刻 整理一下我的化妆包。

lines.en: It's to the point where there's so much stuff that I can't even find my actual products that I use every day.
lines.zh: 它已经 到了这种地步，里面东西多到 我甚至连每天实际用的产品都找不到了。

lines.en: Where is everything? It's like, it's like a bottomless pit in here.
lines.zh: 这里面简直就像个 无底洞。

lines.en: (Getting up at noon) really makes me feel like sets my day off on the wrong foot.
lines.zh: 睡到中午才起床，真的让我感觉 一天开始就不顺。

lines.en: When I’m out here in the mornings, I also like to journal kind of as a replacement of going on my phone.
lines.zh: 当我早上坐在这块户外草坪时，我也喜欢写手帐，算是 代替 玩手机。

lines.en: So I have this MADHAPPY journal.
lines.zh: 所以我有一本 MADHAPPY手帐本。

lines.en: So each day has a little bit of a different prompt.
lines.zh: 每天都会有点不同的 提示问题。

lines.en: And it also has like little mood check-ins for each day.
lines.zh: 而且每天还有类似的小型 心情打卡 板块。

lines.en: I'm about to go make a big purchase inside there at a tech store.
lines.zh: 我正准备去那里的数码店 买个大件。

lines.en: It's been kind of hard for me in my adulthood to break free of my frugal mentality,
lines.zh: 成年后，我一直很难 摆脱节俭的心态，

lines.en: but I really am trying to become more comfortable with spending money on the things that really matter.
lines.zh: 但我真的在努力 让自己 更心安理得地 把钱花在 真正重要的事情上。

lines.en: This is a laptop. And I just realized while my computer was crashing a couple of months ago while I was trying to edit a video,
lines.zh: 这是一台笔记本电脑。几个月前 当我在尝试 剪视频 而我的 电脑死机时，我才意识到，

lines.en: technology should not be bottleneck.
lines.zh: 技术设备不应该成为 瓶颈。

lines.en: It's just silly for me to not have the best possible machine for me to do my job.
lines.zh: 对我来说，没有一台 最好的设备 来 完成我的工作 真的很不明智。

lines.en: Anyway, not to make a huge deal out of this, but this is exciting.
lines.zh: 不管怎样，不想 小题大做，但这确实很令人兴奋。

lines.en: I just got back from doing my hair, and I added this little cute bow that I got in Korea in the subway station.
lines.zh: 我刚 做完头发 回来，还戴上了这个可爱的小蝴蝶结，是我在韩国 地铁站 买的。

lines.en: I wasn't sure if I was going to leave my hair all down or go all up.
lines.zh: 之前我不确定是要 把头发全披下来 还是 全扎上去。

lines.en: I just set a half up half down cause I couldn't decide.
lines.zh: 我干脆就弄了个 半扎半放，因为我实在决定不了。

lines.en: I think the biggest takeaway here is to always cut your hair by a professional, cause I love how she cut my bangs.
lines.zh: 我觉得这里最大的 心得 就是 一定要 找专业人士剪头发，因为我超爱她给我剪的刘海。

lines.en: I don't know why, but having bangs just reminds me of my college days cause I used to have bangs like this.
lines.zh: 不知道为什么，但 留刘海 就 让我想起了大学时代，因为我以前就留过这样的刘海。

lines.en: There have been many occasions, especially on holidays, where I still wake up at 3:00 a.m. but binge-watch my favorite Netflix show.
lines.zh: 有很多次，尤其是在假期，我仍然会在凌晨3点醒来，然后 一口气追完 我最爱的Netflix剧集。

lines.en: Getting enough sleep is the key to waking up feeling refreshed.
lines.zh: 充足的睡眠 是醒来后感到 神清气爽 的关键。

lines.en: That's why you really want to avoid sacrificing sleep to become an early riser because it will catch up with you.
lines.zh: 这就是为什么你真的要避免 牺牲睡眠 去成为一个 早起者，因为它会 让你付出代价。

lines.en: You can cut your sleep short to wake up early for a couple of days, but then sleep deprivation will cause you poor concentration, anxiety, tiredness during the day,
lines.zh: 你可以为了早起而 缩短睡眠 几天，但随后 睡眠不足 会导致你注意力不集中、焦虑、白天疲倦，

lines.en: and it won't be a sleep routine you can maintain. If early rising means cutting sleep, don't do it.
lines.zh: 而且这不是一种 你能长期坚持的睡眠习惯。如果 早起意味着减少睡眠，那千万别这么做。

lines.en: Let's go meet up with some friends. And the ambiance is wonderful.
lines.zh: 我们去 见些朋友吧。而且那里的 氛围很不错。

lines.en: If you're into natural wines, this should be right up your alley.
lines.zh: 如果你 喜欢天然葡萄酒，这应该会 很合你的胃口。

lines.en: I'm enjoying having time off, and not having all these pressing deadlines, and being able to relax.
lines.zh: 我很享受 休假时光，没有那些 紧迫的截止日期，可以好好放松一下。

lines.en: But I'm kind of leaning too deeply into that and really not doing anything else,
lines.zh: 但我好像有点 过于沉溺其中，真的什么其他事都没干，

lines.en: and it's catching up to me.
lines.zh: 而且这 让我有些不安。

lines.en: Let's talk about why you should even want to pack light in the first place.
lines.zh: 让我们聊聊 为什么你一开始就应该考虑 轻装出行。

lines.en: And I think the most obvious one is the fact that it will save you money.
lines.zh: 我认为 最显而易见的原因 就是 它会帮你 省钱。

lines.en: Most airlines nowadays will have you pay extra for checked-in baggage.
lines.zh: 如今大多数航空公司 都会让你 额外支付 托运行李 的费用。

lines.en: So, bringing just a carry-on will save you money. But there's also the potential stress that comes with bringing luggage:
lines.zh: 所以，只带一个 随身登机箱 会 为你省钱。但带行李也会带来 潜在的压力：

lines.en: it could be lost either at the airport or during the flight or somewhere in between;
lines.zh: 它可能会 丢失，无论是在机场 还是在飞行途中 或者 介于两者之间；

lines.en: someone could accidentally take your luggage at baggage drop.
lines.zh: 有人可能会 不小心拿走你的行李 在 行李提取处。

lines.en: I just got to the airport with my luggage, go straight through security, and then onto the plane—no waiting in lines to drop off my luggage.
lines.zh: 我只需带着行李到机场，直接过安检，然后登机——不用 排队 托运行李。

lines.en: Once you start traveling and packing like this, there's truly no going back.
lines.zh: 一旦你开始 这样旅行和打包，就真的 回不去了。

lines.en: Don't make the mistake of grabbing your phone to wake yourself up because this just leads you to hourless scrolling.
lines.zh: 千万别 犯这样的错误：拿起手机来唤醒自己，因为这只会让你 不停地刷手机。

lines.en: Trust me, I've been there before.
lines.zh: 相信我，我深有体会。

lines.en: So instead, you can make a morning playlist with chill songs and listen to it, or read a book that inspires you.
lines.zh: 所以，你可以 制作一个晨间播放列表 播放 舒缓的歌曲 来听，或者 读一本能启发你的书。

lines.en: You can also listen to motivational podcasts.
lines.zh: 你也可以听听 励志播客。

lines.en: All these things get you in the perfect mindset to start the day.
lines.zh: 所有这些都能让你以 最佳状态 开始新的一天。

lines.en: Starting out with this red halter neck tank.
lines.zh: 首先是这件 红色挂脖背心。

lines.en: What I liked about this was the neckline, and I also have been really loving to wear red.
lines.zh: 我喜欢它的 领口设计，而且我也一直 超爱穿红色。

lines.en: I wear a lot of black, and red and black just go super well together.
lines.zh: 我平时穿很多黑色，红色和黑色真是 绝配。

lines.en: I think this will be a beautiful date night top.
lines.zh: 我觉得这会是一件很漂亮的 约会之夜上衣。

lines.en: I got this trench coat, and this one caught my eyes because it's a bit bulky, but I like that about it.
lines.zh: 我淘到了这件 风衣，它之所以 吸引我 是因为它有点臃肿，但我喜欢它这一点。

lines.en: It's so sophisticated, and I see so many girls in New York wearing stuff like this.
lines.zh: 这件衣服很 精致，我在纽约见过好多女孩 穿这种风格的衣服。

lines.en: This next one is a little bit out of my comfort zone, but that's what I liked about it.
lines.zh: 接下来这一件有点 超出我的舒适区，但这也正是我喜欢它的原因。

lines.en: I really admire those girls that can just take the most random, eccentric pieces and put them together to create a really nice outfit. I wouldn't say I'm one of those girls, but I'm trying to be.
lines.zh: 我真的很 佩服那些女孩，她们能够用最随性、奇特的单品 搭配出 很棒的衣服。我不会说我就是那种女孩，但 我正在努力成为。

lines.en: This room is so cozy. That's why we couldn't wake up.
lines.zh: 这个房间太 舒适了。这就是我们一直睡不醒的原因。

lines.en: When we have blackout curtains, it just feels so serene.
lines.zh: 房间里有 遮光窗帘，让人感觉非常 宁静。

lines.en: It's literally a dungeon.
lines.zh: 简直就像是个 地牢 一样。

lines.en: Actually, considering jet lag and everything, and the long-ass travel day we had yesterday, I feel pretty good right now.
lines.zh: 实际上，考虑到 时差 和所有事情，以及我们昨天 漫长的旅行日，我现在感觉还不错。

lines.en: And I think I learned from my mistakes last time.
lines.zh: 而且我想我 从上次的错误中吸取了教训。

lines.en: Last time I like didn't really eat much the first day I got here because I wasn't hungry.
lines.zh: 上次我刚到的第一天 没怎么 吃东西，因为我 不饿。

lines.en: We need to get food, cause I'm freaking starving now.
lines.zh: 我们得 去弄点吃的，因为我现在 饿得要命。

lines.en: The dried apples were out of stock, so we went with the baby bananas.
lines.zh: 苹果干 缺货了，所以我们 选了（买了）小香蕉。

lines.en: I go through nut butter like crazy.
lines.zh: 我 消耗 坚果酱 速度惊人（超爱吃）。

lines.en: And I typically have this on top of a rice cake before my workouts in the morning to get like some carbs and fats before I work out,
lines.zh: 而且我通常在早上锻炼前 会把这个 涂在米糕上，这样可以在锻炼前摄入一些碳水和脂肪，

lines.en: because I cannot work out for the life of me on an empty stomach.
lines.zh: 因为我 无论如何也（绝对） 不能空腹运动。

lines.en: It would be a mess.
lines.zh: 那会 一团糟（很糟糕）。

lines.en: I'm craving nothing but like a very solid, yummy omelette with lots of cheese and ham, like all the fixings.
lines.zh: 我现在 只想吃（极度渴望）一个扎实的美味煎蛋卷，里面要加很多奶酪和火腿，配料 都加满。

lines.en: Sit down in a room, close your eyes, and envision the ideal version of yourself.
lines.zh: 坐在房间里，闭上眼睛，设想 理想中的自己。

lines.en: I even made a physical vision board for myself.
lines.zh: 我甚至为自己制作了一个实体 愿景板。

lines.en: Maybe you're in a pressing situation or like an argument with somebody, a breakup,
lines.zh: 也许你正面临 紧迫的状况，或是和某人起争执，或是经历分手，

lines.en: and your emotions take over and you really want to handle something a certain way that might not be the best.
lines.zh: 你的情绪 占了上风（失控），你特别想用某种特定的方式来处理问题，而那或许不是最好的做法。

lines.en: Taking a step back, taking a deep breath, and thinking about how the highest version of yourself would handle the situation.
lines.zh: 退一步，深呼吸，思考一下你内心 最高阶版本 的自己 会如何处理这种情况。

lines.en: The design is super cute, but most importantly, they are very durable.
lines.zh: 这个设计超级可爱，但更重要的是，它们非常 耐用。

lines.en: These are the impact cases. So even when you drop your phone, it's protected.
lines.zh: 它们是 防撞手机壳。所以即使你不小心摔了手机，也会得到保护。

lines.en: As you know, I'm on a month-long travel trip,
lines.zh: 大家都知道，我目前正在进行 为期一个月的旅行，

lines.en: which means I am lugging around all my camera equipment, laptops, bags.
lines.zh: 这意味着我需要 随身携带（拖拽着） 所有的相机设备、电脑、包包。

lines.en: So it's a must-have for me to have a durable and protective phone case.
lines.zh: 因此对我来说，拥有一个耐用且具有保护性的手机壳是 必不可少的。

lines.en: We‘re gonna go to this place called Denbro, and it’s a drive-thru (coffee shop).
lines.zh: 我们现在要去一个叫做Denbro的地方，它是一家 得来速（免下车咖啡店）。

lines.en: Wow I feel so out of touch going back to hometown and seeing all these new stores.
lines.zh: 哇，回到家乡看到这么多新店，感觉自己仿佛与这些变化 脱节了。

lines.en: Like I feel like I missed many chapters, I missed everything.
lines.zh: 就好像我 错过了很多人生篇章，错过了一切。

lines.en: They accidentally gave me two drinks. I feel like a food reviewer now.
lines.zh: 他们不小心给了我两杯饮料。我现在感觉自己像个 美食评论家。

lines.en: So this one is the peppermint latte drink. I can get behind this.
lines.zh: 这杯是薄荷拿铁饮料。我能 欣赏（支持/接受）它的风味。

lines.en: This is really really good it actually exceeded my expectations.
lines.zh: 它真的很不错，实际上 超出了我的预期。

lines.en: I was literally taken out, sat on my butt last week with the flu, and it was so awful.
lines.zh: 上周我真是 被病魔击倒了，因为流感 什么也做不了，感觉太难受了。

lines.en: I entered into another state of crustiness, and I'm still trying to redeem myself from that.
lines.zh: 我陷入了另一种 糟糕邋遢的状态，现在还在努力 挽救（恢复）自己。

lines.en: So we're going to focus on that this week, getting myself back to feeling 100%.
lines.zh: 所以这周我们要重点关注这点，让自己恢复到 满血（最佳）状态。

lines.en: First things first, we have a hair appointment for today, which kicking it off strong.
lines.zh: 首先，我们今天预约了做头发，算是开了一个 强势的好头。

lines.en: I feel like my hair just gets, like, it gets very one-dimensional.
lines.zh: 我觉得我的发型显得有些，非常 单调（单一）。

lines.en: Sometimes I want like some oomph to it.
lines.zh: 有时我想让它 更有活力（增加点亮点）。

lines.en: The last time I did color, it traumatized me a little bit.
lines.zh: 上次染发的经历，给我留下了 些许心理阴影。

lines.en: It was when I was 15, and I had a really awful ombre.
lines.zh: 那是我15岁的时候，染了一个非常糟糕的 渐变色。

lines.en: I was so relieved to be heading home this evening.
lines.zh: 今晚回家真是让我感到 如释重负。

lines.en: Arriving home to this front door just put the biggest smile on my face.
lines.zh: 回到家，看到这扇门，我的脸上 露出了最灿烂的笑容。

lines.en: Truly, truly, there is no place like home.
lines.zh: 真的，真的，没有什么地方能比得上家。

lines.en: And truly, if anything was going to make me feel better after a tough day in the office,
lines.zh: 而且，如果说有什么能让我感觉好些 在办公室度过了 艰难的一天 后，

lines.en: it is being handed a piece of warm garlic bread about 30 seconds after I walk in the door.
lines.zh: 那就是在进门 30 秒钟后，有人递给我 一块热乎乎的蒜香面包。

lines.en: I don't know how to make sure that I always have warm garlic bread on tap when I get home,
lines.zh: 我不知道该怎么确保 每次回家都有 随时可享用的 热蒜香面包，

lines.en: but I honestly think I found the new key to my happiness.
lines.zh: 但我确实觉得 我找到了 幸福的新秘诀。

lines.en: I sat myself on the sofa, got my laptop out, and decided to plow on with work for another couple of hours.
lines.zh: 我坐在沙发上，拿出笔记本电脑，决定再 埋头苦干 几个小时工作。

lines.en: I read this a few years ago, four years ago actually, during the first lockdown.
lines.zh: 几年前我读过这本书，确切地说是四年前，在第一次 居家隔离 期间。

lines.en: I was at my parents' house, and they're big readers, so whenever I'm out of inspiration,
lines.zh: 那时我住在父母家，他们都是 大读者（很爱读书的人），所以每当我 没有灵感 时，

lines.en: I usually flick through the shelves to steal something, and this was one of them.
lines.zh: 我通常会 翻找他们的书架 偷偷“顺”走一本书，这本就是其中之一。

lines.en: It is such a good summer read because you're immediately transported to the Mediterranean in the blazing sun and the jellyfish-littered waters.
lines.zh: 这真是一本绝佳的夏日读物 因为你仿佛瞬间被 传送到了 地中海 炽热的骄阳下和分布着水母的海水中。

lines.en: I just got to the nail salon. For the longest time, I've been just doing like a solid color and then white chrome on top.
lines.zh: 我刚到美甲店。很长一段时间以来，我一直都是做 纯色 美甲 然后在上面涂层白色魔镜粉。

lines.en: It's just been my fallback and my go-to because you can't really go wrong with it.
lines.zh: 这已经成了我的 保底方案和首选 因为它绝对 不会出错。

lines.en: However, I think today I'm going to switch it up and do a nail design.
lines.zh: 不过，我想今天我要 换个花样（改变一下），做个美甲彩绘设计。

lines.en: I also love French tips as well, but I find with those, I get sick of them after like two weeks or so.
lines.zh: 我也很喜欢法式美甲，但我发现做法式的话，大概两周左右我就会 看腻了。

lines.en: But today definitely got to do something fun.
lines.zh: 但今天我一定要 试试新花样（做些有趣的事）。

lines.en: So we'll head on in and freshen them up.
lines.zh: 那我们就 进去吧，让指甲 焕然一新。

lines.en: I fell into this trap so frequently in my 20s, is that when I would buy something new, I would get a little high.
lines.zh: 我20多岁时经常 掉进这个陷阱，就是每当买新东西时，都会感到一种 小小的兴奋。

lines.en: I get a little buzz from shopping, which I think a lot of us can probably relate to.
lines.zh: 我能从购物中获得一种 快感，我想我们很多人可能都 深有同感。

lines.en: And this buzz is short-lived, and in my case, led to just so much over-buying, so much consumerism,
lines.zh: 而这种兴奋是 短暂的，就我而言，它导致了极其严重的 过度消费，如此多的消费主义，

lines.en: and I had things with the tags still on. I just had so much excess stuff.
lines.zh: 而且我买的很多东西 吊牌都没摘。我就是有太多 多余的物品 了。

lines.en: And since doing my little wishlist board method and being considerate and really carefully thinking about a purchase before I make it,
lines.zh: 自从采用了我的 心愿板方法 并且考虑得更周到、更仔细地思考每次购买之后，

lines.en: it has had a huge and drastic effect on the amount of items that I buy.
lines.zh: 它对我的购买物品数量产生了巨大而 显著的影响。

lines.en: I'm going to make, like, my overall to-do list for today and then do some chores around the house.
lines.zh: 我打算先 列出今天的整体待办清单 然后做些家务。

lines.en: And then, to really get myself in the zone, I'm gonna go to the library and study there with a friend.
lines.zh: 接着，为了真正 让自己进入状态，我打算去图书馆 和朋友一起学习。

lines.en: I feel like putting myself in a work or school environment, also going with a friend just makes it a little easier.
lines.zh: 我觉得把自己置身于工作或学习环境中，再加上有朋友作伴，会让事情变得容易些。

lines.en: And just, we're both in the same boat.
lines.zh: 而且，我们俩 处境相同（同病相怜）。

lines.en: Now that my brain isn't scattered with everything that I have to do and it's like exactly listed out.
lines.zh: 现在我的大脑不再被必须要做的各种杂事 搞得心烦意乱，因为它们都已经清晰地 列出来了。

lines.en: That's like how I get the most productive when it's not floating in my brain but it's like written on paper and I can, like, cross things off.
lines.zh: 这就是我最高效的状态 当事情不再在脑海里飘忽不定，而是写在纸上，并且我可以把它们 逐一划掉 时。

lines.en: The seventh glow-up tip is taking care of your hair.
lines.zh: 第七个 变美秘诀 是 认真护发。

lines.en: Of course, eating healthy is huge for the health of your hair, /
lines.zh: 当然，健康饮食对头发健康 至关重要，/

lines.en: but also using heat protectant before you use heat tools like a curling iron or straightener.
lines.zh: 也要使用 热保护剂 在你使用加热工具之前，比如卷发棒或直发夹。

lines.en: Not putting your hair in too many really tight ponytails or really tight buns because that can lead to a lot of breakage.
lines.zh: 不要把头发扎成太紧的马尾辫或者太紧的丸子头，因为那会导致很多 断裂。

lines.en: Putting as little bleach or dye on your hair as possible, this is a big one.
lines.zh: 尽可能少地漂染你的头发，这点 非常重要。

lines.en: I've just thrown a hoodie on this morning. I have done my full makeup for the first time this week today.
lines.zh: 今早我就随便 套了件卫衣。今天是我这周第一次 化全妆。

lines.en: Because honestly, there was just something about the week before your period that just any ounce of self-confidence you might have, gone.
lines.zh: 因为说实话，来大姨妈的前一周 就是很邪门，你可能拥有的哪怕一丝丝自信，荡然无存。

lines.en: My whole face every morning is so puffy. I get such bad water retention in the week before my period.
lines.zh: 每天早上我整张脸都超级 浮肿。我 水肿 得特别厉害 在姨妈前一周。

lines.en: So it feels like everything you've been doing at Pilates is out the window.
lines.zh: 感觉 你之前练普拉提的所有努力都白费了。

lines.en: So anyway, I did my makeup today just to feel a bit more like myself.
lines.zh: 不管怎样，我今天化了妆 只是为了让自己感觉更 像平时的自己 一点。

lines.en: Mom and I are actually going to pop out and do a little bit of like furniture hunting this morning.
lines.zh: 我和妈妈今早要 出去逛逛 看看 家具。

lines.en: I've been coughing a bunch. I get sick really easily when submitted to intense temperature changes.
lines.zh: 我一直在 狂咳嗽。我 特别容易生病 遇到气温骤变时。

lines.en: And then yesterday's travel day stressed me out so much. I cried so much, so I have a really stuffy nose.
lines.zh: 而且昨天的旅行行程把我 搞得压力巨大。我哭得很惨，所以现在鼻子严重 堵塞。

lines.en: I really need to like rejuvenate.
lines.zh: 我真的非常需要 恢复元气。

lines.en: I was experiencing a micro-burnout from being on the go non-stop for a month, partying and always running to the next destination.
lines.zh: 我经历了一次 轻微的职业倦怠期 因为这一个月来 马不停蹄地奔波，参加各种派对，永远在赶往下一个目的地。

lines.en: So, I found myself craving downtime.
lines.zh: 因此，我发现自己极度 渴望能有停机休息的时间。

lines.en: I just purchased this iMac in my previous video, and it's by far the best purchase of this year.
lines.zh: 我刚买了上个视频里出现的这台 iMac，这绝对是 迄今为止我今年最棒的一笔消费。

lines.en: I think it's so convenient. Like, my posture is so much better because it's positioned right at my eye level.
lines.zh: 我觉得它太方便了。比如，我的 坐姿改善了很多 因为它正好放在与我 视线平齐 的高度。

lines.en: Recently, my skin has been purging. It might be a deviating symptom. Like, I don't know what's going on.
lines.zh: 最近，我的皮肤在 爆痘（排毒期）。这可能是某种 异常反应。我也不知道到底怎么回事。

lines.en: It might be seasonal allergies. It's strange because my acne has always been very on and off, but it's okay.
lines.zh: 可能是季节性过敏。挺奇怪的，因为我的痘痘总是 时好时坏（断断续续），不过没关系。

lines.en: Skin is skin. We all get acne at times.
lines.zh: 皮肤就是这样（难免有状况）。我们都 有长痘的时候。

lines.en: From the moment we set foot on European soil, we were all anticipating arriving in Italy as my family's favorite vacation destination, as my grad trip location.
lines.zh: 从我们 踏上 欧洲大陆的那一刻起，我们就一直期待着抵达意大利，因为这是我全家最喜欢的度假胜地，也是我的 毕业旅行目的地。

lines.en: Italy holds a sweet place in my heart and brings me so much comfort to visit.
lines.zh: 意大利在我心中 占据着特殊（甜蜜）的位置 每次去都 让我感到无比治愈。

lines.en: We stayed at the Plus Hostel, which I highly recommend for its proximity to the city center, its cleanliness, and its friendly staff.
lines.zh: 我们住在Plus Hostel，我 强烈推荐 这家旅馆，因为它 紧邻市中心，干净整洁，工作人员也非常友好。

lines.en: Wanting to get our first fix of many of Italian gelato, we walked to La Carraia.
lines.zh: 为了吃到第一口正宗意大利冰淇淋，我们步行去了La Carraia。

lines.en: After dinner, we set out to explore the city and walked to the Duomo, which was such a majestic sight.
lines.zh: 晚餐后，我们 出发去探索这座城市 步行到了大教堂，那景色真是 雄伟壮观。

lines.en: It glowed in the night.
lines.zh: 它在夜色中 熠熠生辉。

lines.en: But the key thing here is to gather information the heck out of the company /
lines.zh: 但这里的 关键点 在于要 拼命地（极其详尽地）收集公司信息 /

lines.en: and learn what their level structure and their compensation stance are.
lines.zh: 了解他们的 层级结构 和 薪酬理念。

lines.en: Try to see what level they're slating you for.
lines.zh: 弄清楚他们打算 把你安排在 哪个层级。

lines.en: Ask, "Can you walk through how levels work at the company? What level is this for? Is level flexible? How does the team differentiate this level from the next level?"
lines.zh: 可以问，“您能 详细说明一下公司的职级是如何运作的吗？这个职位属于哪一层级？层级是流动变化的吗？团队是如何区分上下级的？”

lines.en: Then ask, "Can you break down how the compensation package is structured?"
lines.zh: 然后再问，“您能 拆解一下这个薪酬包的具体构成吗？”

lines.en: So someone had asked me, "How do you make the most out of being single in your 20s?"
lines.zh: 有人问我，“你在20多岁的时候，是怎么 最大限度地过好单身生活的？”

lines.en: I've only had one, like, really long-term relationship, and then there's, like, two other people that I dated for a decent amount of time on and off, /
lines.zh: 我只谈过一次 真正意义上的长期恋爱，也有两次 我 断断续续地谈了较长一段时间，/

lines.en: and then there's been a lot of flings and whatnot and enough interesting stories to fill the memoir one day.
lines.zh: 还有过很多 短暂的暧昧拉扯等等 和足够有趣的故事 足以写进回忆录。

lines.en: So when someone asked me this, I said it allows total autonomy of your schedule, decisions, interests, and direction you're taking in life.
lines.zh: 所以当有人这么问我时，我会说，这让你对自己的日程、决定、兴趣、以及人生方向拥有 完全的自主权。

lines.en: I think it's important to be selfish in quotations in this season for a little while to understand what paths you want to pursue, /
lines.zh: 我认为在这个人生阶段，暂时 打个引号的“自私” 一点是很重要的 去 弄清楚你到底想走什么样的路，/

lines.en: so that you can show up as a better partner down the line when the timing is right if you want a long-term relationship.
lines.zh: 这样你就能 在将来（长远来看）以更好的伴侣姿态出现 在合适的时机 如果你想要一段长期关系。

lines.en: We're doing an all-nighter. The reason for this is because my sleeping schedule is currently disastrous, /
lines.zh: 我们今晚要 熬通宵。原因是目前的 作息时间简直是一团糟，/

lines.en: and that in combination with the fact that I know my exams are starting in about a week or so, /
lines.zh: 再 加上考虑到 我知道大概一周后就要开始考试了，/

lines.en: has somehow made me justify the fact that I can pull an all-nighter tonight.
lines.zh: 这莫名其妙地让我觉得 今晚熬个通宵是理所当然的。

lines.en: I literally feel like I'm going insane right now. Like, and it feels like I'm tired, but I'm wide awake.
lines.zh: 我现在真的感觉快 疯了。就是那种感觉明明很累，但又 异常清醒。

lines.en: I don't really like how this feels.
lines.zh: 我真的不 喜欢这种感觉。

theme: 网络恶评与冒名顶替综合症

lines.en: As someone who is on the Internet, it's inevitable for me to get a lot of people's opinions.
lines.zh: 作为一个 在网上活跃的人，收到很多人的意见是 不可避免的。

lines.en: And on one end, I'm grateful for them because it allows me to grow and improve.
lines.zh: 一方面，我很感激这些意见，因为这能 让我成长和进步。

lines.en: But sometimes, I lose myself in that process because it leads to burnouts and impostor syndrome.
lines.zh: 但有时，我会 在这个过程中迷失自我，因为它会导致 精疲力竭（职业倦怠） 和 冒名顶替综合症（自我能力否定）。

lines.en: So I'm trying to find a happy medium where I can do both in a healthy way.
lines.zh: 所以我正在努力 寻找一个完美的折中点（平衡点），让 我能以健康的方式平衡这两者。

lines.en: Once again, I've ended up with a very monochrome look for today's work outfit.
lines.zh: 今天的上班穿搭，我又一次 弄成了非常纯色的单色系风格。

lines.en: This is the tank top that I got from Dish a few weeks ago. I am obsessed with it.
lines.zh: 这件背心是几周前从 Dish 买的。我简直 爱死它了。

lines.en: I've worn it so much since I bought it because the shape of it is just so versatile.
lines.zh: 自从买来后我穿了无数次，因为它的版型实在是太 百搭了。

lines.en: Like, I've worn this out on a night out, actually. But I'm also wearing it into work because this neckline is just genius. I love it.
lines.zh: 甚至晚上出门时，我也会穿着它。但我也会 穿着它去上班 因为这个领口设计实在太 绝了。我超爱它。

lines.en: I've just got my usual black trousers on, but I'm loving the little pop of gold, this belt I also got from Dish a few weeks ago, /
lines.zh: 我下半身就穿了 平时常穿的黑裤子，但我超爱那抹 跳脱的金色，这条腰带也是我几周前从 Dish 买的，/

lines.en: and I think it just breaks up the black and white quite nicely.
lines.zh: 我觉得它非常完美地 打破了黑白的单调。

lines.en: I am not a fan of cooking or baking, I hate doing the dishes.
lines.zh: 我 不喜欢（不是...的粉丝） 做饭或烘焙，我极其讨厌 洗碗。

lines.en: And when I get hungry I just want something super convenient.
lines.zh: 当我 饿了的时候 我只想吃点 超级方便的 东西。

lines.en: It's very rare that I'm in the cooking mood but so far today I'm doing such a good job.
lines.zh: 我 很少 有 做饭的兴致 但今天到目前为止我做得还真不错。

lines.en: So, I went with pasta and then I have chicken, avocado, onions, tomatoes, and basil.
lines.zh: 所以，我 选择了 意面 然后我准备了 鸡肉、牛油果、洋葱、番茄和罗勒。

lines.en: I also drizzled some lemon on top and put salt and pepper.
lines.zh: 我还在上面 淋了 些柠檬汁 并 撒了盐和胡椒。

lines.en: That is the perfect bite, wow that is so good!
lines.zh: 这一口真是 完美，哇，简直 太好吃了！

lines.en: We've all had moments where we impulsively react too quickly.
lines.zh: 我们都有过这样的时刻：因 冲动而反应 过快。

lines.en: Maybe it's an unexpected comment from a partner or sudden traffic, a last-minute project change.
lines.zh: 也许是伴侣 意想不到的评论 或是 突如其来的堵车，亦或是最后一刻的项目变动。

lines.en: How many times have we wished that we just took a little pause before diving headfirst into a response or reaction?
lines.zh: 有多少次我们希望自己能 稍作停顿 而不是 不顾一切地（一头扎进） 做出回应或反应？

lines.en: We all know that speedy reactions can sometimes lead to misjudgments and missed opportunities to understand the big picture.
lines.zh: 我们都知道 过快的反应 有时会导致 判断失误 并错失把握 全局 的机会。

lines.en: So I've been actively trying to create space between receiving information and formulating a response, giving myself permission to digest and just let the information marinate.
lines.zh: 因此，我一直在积极尝试 留出缓冲空间，在接收信息和 构思回应 之间 允许自己去 消化 并让信息慢慢 沉淀。

lines.en: I've gotten into the habit of just taking a deep breath anytime I feel emotionally charged.
lines.zh: 我已经 养成了...的习惯，就是 深吸一口气 每当我觉得 情绪激动 时。

theme: 寻找最佳运动时间与生物钟

lines.en: How do you figure out what time of day you should work out?
lines.zh: 你如何 弄清楚 一天中 什么时候 应该健身？

lines.en: It all comes down to personal preference, but scientifically, a big factor is your natural circadian rhythm,
lines.zh: 这主要 归结于 个人偏好，但从科学角度来看，一个 重要因素 是你自然的 昼夜节律，

lines.en: and everyone has a different set body clock and a time of day where they have more energy or less energy.
lines.zh: 每个人都有不同的 固有生物钟 以及 一天中精力更充沛或稍显不足的时段。

lines.en: This is called your “chronotype”, which is your body's natural preference for sleep and alertness.
lines.zh: 这被称为你的 “时间类型”，也就是你的身体对 睡眠和清醒时间的自然偏好。

lines.en: There are four categories, and the easiest way I remember it is whether or not you are an early bird or a night owl.
lines.zh: 一共有 四种类型，而我 记住它们最简单的方法 是看你是 早起鸟 还是 夜猫子。

lines.en: This morning, my arms are on fire. I can hardly feel them right now.
lines.zh: 今天早上，我的手臂 像火烧一样（极度酸痛）。我现在 几乎感觉不到它们 了。

lines.en: Like, my biceps are twitching still. That was such a good arm workout.
lines.zh: 就好像，我的 肱二头肌 还在 抽搐。那真是一次 超棒的手臂训练。

lines.en: But I just made my post-workout drink.
lines.zh: 但我刚刚做了一杯 练后补给饮品。

lines.en: And I really try to watch my artificial sweetener intake and cut it out where I can.
lines.zh: 我真的很注意 控制（留意） 我的 人工甜味剂摄入量 并在可能的情况下 戒掉它。

lines.en: I'm pretty picky about what protein powders I like.
lines.zh: 我对我喜欢的蛋白粉非常 挑剔。

lines.en: I never like things obviously that taste very chalky or have a very protein flavor to them, very specific.
lines.zh: 我从来都不喜欢那种尝起来很 粉状（口感粗糙） 的东西 或者带有很重 蛋白质腥味 的，我要求 很具体。

lines.en: But I freaking love this protein powder.
lines.zh: 但我 超级爱 这款蛋白粉。

theme: 极简早晨护肤与对抗敏感肌

lines.en: First, going with the toner that's really mild and calming because I have pretty sensitive skin.
lines.zh: 首先，选用 这款爽肤水，它非常 温和舒缓，因为我的皮肤非常 敏感。

lines.en: I love serums. I feel like it's the perfect condensed vitamins.
lines.zh: 我超爱 精华液。我觉得它就像是完美的 浓缩维生素。

lines.en: It’s like acid from the Ordinary and it helps with acne-prone skin but I realize that it doesn't really help with like active acne.
lines.zh: 这就像the Ordinary的酸类产品 它对 易长痘的肌肤 很有帮助 但我发现它对于那种 正处于发炎状态的痘痘 并没有太大帮助。

lines.en: It's more for pre-breakouts.
lines.zh: 它更多是用于 痘痘爆发前的预防。

lines.en: This just evens out your skin tone so nicely.
lines.zh: 它能非常完美地 均匀 你的 肤色。

lines.en: So I got a few crew necks. I'm very particular with my crew necks as we all know.
lines.zh: 所以我买了几件 圆领卫衣（套头衫）。众所周知，我对圆领卫衣非常 讲究（挑剔）。

lines.en: This one is like a light gray crew neck. This one isn't as like heavy and oversized.
lines.zh: 这件是一件 浅灰色 的圆领衫。它不像那种厚重且 超大版型 的。

lines.en: It's more of like a lightweight type of crew neck.
lines.zh: 它更偏向于那种 轻薄款的圆领衫。

lines.en: And then this is more of that heavy knit type of material.
lines.zh: 然后这件更偏向于那种 粗针织材质。

lines.en: I'm constantly wearing it because I just love how it fits.
lines.zh: 我 经常穿它 因为我太喜欢 它的版型（穿在身上的感觉） 了。

lines.en: Also love how people style these under like long peacoats and stuff and kind of give them a street style look to them.
lines.zh: 我也很喜欢人们把这种衣服 搭配在 长款 双排扣大衣 之类的里面 给它们赋予一种 街头风的造型。

lines.en: And then the last thing I got were these sweats. They're just straight-legged Ivory colored sweatpants.
lines.zh: 最后我买的一件是这条 运动裤。就是一条象牙白色的 直筒运动裤。

theme: 女孩的生理期真实状态

lines.en: The first most important thing when you're on your menstrual cycle is to get as much sleep as possible.
lines.zh: 最重要的一件事，当你处于 生理期 时，就是 尽可能多睡觉。

lines.en: I have the most crazy bedhead. I think I just sleep so restlessly whenever I'm on my period.
lines.zh: 我睡醒后的 头发乱得夸张（像鸡窝头）。我觉得每次 睡得极其不安稳 每当我 来例假 时。

lines.en: Taking a really hot shower can help with your period cramps,
lines.zh: 洗个 非常热的热水澡 有助于缓解你的 痛经，

lines.en: but honestly, the reason I like taking scorching hot showers is because it's just really comforting to me.
lines.zh: 但老实说，我喜欢洗那种 滚烫的 热水澡的原因 仅仅是因为它让我感觉 很舒服。

lines.en: I forgo all my jeans and just wear leggings and a comfy sweatshirt.
lines.zh: 我 抛弃（放弃穿） 所有的牛仔裤 只穿 紧身打底裤和舒适的卫衣。

lines.en: The worst thing is I have my period and I have a cold, and my throat is killing me. It's like a double whammy.
lines.zh: 最糟糕的是我来例假的同时还感冒了，喉咙 疼得要命。这简直是 双重打击（祸不单行）。

lines.en: Reading is hands down my most favorite high quality leisure activity.
lines.zh: 阅读 毫无疑问（绝对） 是 我最喜欢的 高质量休闲活动。

lines.en: And it's because in one spot, I can travel to all parts of the country.
lines.zh: 因为 在书的方寸之间，我可以 游遍全国各地。

lines.en: I can even like time travel to different time periods. I can enter the minds of the most brilliant and most hilarious people.
lines.zh: 我甚至能像 时间旅行 一样去到不同的时代。我能够 探索（进入）那些最出色、最幽默的人的思想世界。

lines.en: And I feel like my love for reading really started the second I graduated from college.
lines.zh: 我觉得我对阅读的热爱真正开始于 我 大学毕业的 那一刻。

lines.en: I was like, "Oh wait, I don't need to read anything that anyone assigned me? Like I get to choose what books I wanna read?"
lines.zh: 我当时就在想，‘哦，等等，我不需要去读 任何人 布置（指定） 给我的东西了？我可以自己 选择 我想读的书了？’

lines.en: And that just blew my mind.
lines.zh: 这个想法简直 震撼了我（让我大开眼界）。

lines.en: I splash my face with water, I put on a little bit of moisturizer just so that my skin feels nice and hydrated,
lines.zh: 我 用水稍微洗了把脸，涂了一点 保湿霜 只是为了让皮肤感觉舒适 水润，

lines.en: but my actual skincare routine does not take place, up until I'm done with my workout.
lines.zh: 但我真正的护肤流程还没有 开始（发生），一直要等到我 锻炼结束之后。

lines.en: And then it's time to pick out my gym fit of the day.
lines.zh: 接下来就该 挑选 今天的 健身穿搭 了。

lines.en: I think a cute outfit for the gym is so essential to boost your motivation.
lines.zh: 我觉得一套 好看的运动服 对于健身来说 至关重要 会显著 激发你的动力。

lines.en: I go to the gym about four times a week, and I 100% prefer an early morning workout over an evening or nighttime workout.
lines.zh: 我每周大概去健身房 四次，并且我 百分百更喜欢 清晨锻炼 而不是傍晚或夜间锻炼。

lines.en: Scientifically, weightlifting is not relaxing as it does spike your adrenaline production.
lines.zh: 从科学角度来说，举重并不让人放松 因为它确实会 激增你的肾上腺素分泌。

lines.en: But incorporating physical movement is something that brings me inner peace.
lines.zh: 但 将身体运动纳入日常 确实能给我带来 内心的平静。

theme: 内向打工人的周一挣扎

lines.en: It took every effort in my body to wake up this morning.
lines.zh: 今天早上我简直 使出了浑身解数（费了九牛二虎之力） 才 醒过来。

lines.en: On Mondays, I typically work from home.
lines.zh: 周一，我通常 在家办公。

lines.en: So, before I hop on to my very first meeting, which is our stand-up,
lines.zh: 所以，在 跳上（加入） 我的 第一个会议，也就是我们的 每日站会 之前，

lines.en: I'm just gonna have my yogurt bowl for breakfast and much-needed coffee to help me wake up.
lines.zh: 我打算吃个 酸奶碗当早餐 再来杯 急需的咖啡 帮我清醒一下。

lines.en: I don't know about you guys, but for me personally, it's so hard to go into the office for more than two days consecutively.
lines.zh: 我不知道你们是怎么想的，但就我个人而言，连续去办公室超过两天真的是太难熬了，连续地。

lines.en: But that's mainly because I'm an introvert, so all the social interaction I have in the office really does drain all my energy,
lines.zh: 但这主要是因为我是个 内向的人，所以我在办公室里的所有 社交互动 真的会 耗尽我所有的精力，

lines.en: and I get so exhausted afterwards.
lines.zh: 之后我会变得非常 精疲力尽。

lines.en: A lot of you guys have been asking me for like an honest review on them (AirPods Max).
lines.zh: 好多小伙伴都一直询问我 对它们 (AirPods Max) 的 真实评价（客观测评）。

lines.en: I love how it goes with all of my outfits and it just kind of upgrades your outfits.
lines.zh: 我超爱它能百搭我所有的衣服， 感觉它瞬间 提升了你的整体穿搭质感。

lines.en: My AirPods Max have never died on me.
lines.zh: 我的 AirPods Max 还从来没出现过 中途没电关机 的情况。

lines.en: If you've been saving up for it, I say go for it.
lines.zh: 如果你一直在 为此攒钱， 我建议 直接冲（买下它）。

lines.en: But I don't think this is something you really need to go out of your budget for.
lines.zh: 但我不认为这是 你真正需要 超出预算去硬买 的东西。

theme: 下班后的微醺职场社交

lines.en: We went for drinks after work because it was someone's birthday,
lines.zh: 我们下班后去喝了点酒， 因为有 同事过生日，

lines.en: and I had two margaritas and came home really quite tipsy.
lines.zh: 我喝了两杯玛格丽塔， 回到家时真的挺 微醺（醉醺醺） 的。

lines.en: But it was nice to have that out-of-office bonding time with the team.
lines.zh: 但能有那样 办公室外的团队联络感情时光 还是很棒的。

lines.en: I really feel like I got to know them better,
lines.zh: 我真的觉得我 更加了解他们了，

lines.en: and it was also a great opportunity to talk to people that I haven't had as much contact with because we don't work on the same things.
lines.zh: 这也是个 绝佳的机会 去和那些我平时 接触 不多的人聊天 因为我们负责的工作内容不同。

lines.en: So yeah, it was a really nice time.
lines.zh: 所以，嗯，那真是一段 很开心的时光。

theme: 强迫症的高效旅行打包术

lines.en: My key to packing is packing cubes.
lines.zh: 我 打包行李的秘诀 就是 收纳袋。

lines.en: These are my tank tops and pajamas.
lines.zh: 这些是我的 背心和睡衣。

lines.en: Everything else I always try to roll as neatly as possible: dresses, workout clothes, cover-ups, undergarments,
lines.zh: 至于其他所有的东西，我总是尽量把它们 卷得整整齐齐：连衣裙、运动服、沙滩罩衫、内衣，

lines.en: and having it sectioned off is such a game changer when you're traveling for long periods of time.
lines.zh: 把它们 分门别类地隔开收纳 好 简直是带来了 革命性的改变（质的飞跃） 特别是当你进行长途旅行时。

lines.en: And then on this side, we have two purses, my shoes for the trip, which are loafers,
lines.zh: 而在另一边，我放了两个包，我这次 旅行的鞋子，有乐福鞋，

lines.en: pair of running sneakers, little beachy slides, little heels for a night out, as well as a pair of walking sandals.
lines.zh: 一双 跑鞋，小小的 沙滩拖鞋，晚上穿的小高跟鞋，还有一双适合走路的凉鞋。

lines.en: And I'm gonna reveal to you guys how type A I can truly be.
lines.zh: 接下来我要向你们 揭秘 我到底能有多 A型人格（控制狂/极度追求完美）。

lines.en: I live in a studio, things get messy quickly and I really need to kind of constantly just go through a lot of my things.
lines.zh: 我住在一间 单身公寓（开间） 里，东西很快就会变乱 所以我真的需要经常去 整理我的一大堆东西。

lines.en: Toss old things, donate old things and just keep things decluttered or it just feels like a wreck.
lines.zh: 扔掉旧物，捐赠旧物 并且保持物品 整洁（断舍离） 否则感觉房间就像个 废墟（灾难现场） 一样。

lines.en: So It's kind of a blessing and a curse.
lines.zh: 所以这算是一把 双刃剑（是福也是祸）。

lines.en: It does force me to be extra clean.
lines.zh: 它确实 迫使我保持格外的整洁。

lines.en: Right now actually my apartment is like fairly clean but I'm just gonna do some deep cleaning.
lines.zh: 其实现在我的公寓还算挺干净的 但我打算做个 深度大扫除。

theme: 赞美与接受赞美的艺术

lines.en: It's just so much more empowering, it makes us feel better about ourselves, and it also makes the other person feel valued too.
lines.zh: 这真的更能 赋予人力量，让我们自我感觉更好，同时也会让对方 感到被重视。

lines.en: It's a win-win. And the same thing goes when we're receiving compliments.
lines.zh: 这是个 双赢 的局面。同样地，这也适用于 当我们接受赞美时。

lines.en: In the past, I used to downplay or brush off compliments, thinking I was being modest.
lines.zh: 过去，我经常会 贬低或敷衍（推脱）别人的赞美，以为自己那是谦虚。

lines.en: But when someone is offering praise, they're gifting you with their admiration.
lines.zh: 但当别人 给出赞美 时，他们是在把自己的钦佩 作为礼物送给你。

lines.en: And to dismiss it is to downplay yourself and also to refuse someone's heartfelt gift.
lines.zh: 而 不予理睬（拒绝） 它，就是在贬低你自己 同时也是在拒绝别人 发自内心的礼物。

lines.en: So the next time someone gives you a compliment, just accept it and say thank you.
lines.zh: 所以下次有人夸你时，坦然接受并说句谢谢就好。

theme: 打破生活重复的仓鼠轮

lines.en: Life might feel like it's just coming at you, and you can't stop it.
lines.zh: 生活有时感觉就像是 迎面砸向你，而你根本无法让它停下来。

lines.en: Months and years are whizzing by in this kind of same monotonous routine,
lines.zh: 岁月就在这种千篇一律的 单调日常 中 飞逝而过，

lines.en: and you might be pushed to feel like, "Is this it? Is this everything life is?"
lines.zh: 你可能会被逼得产生这种感觉：“难道就是这样了吗？这就是生活的全部了吗？”

lines.en: I think that's a very normal and healthy thing to feel on this crazy world we live in where we are meant to run on this little hamster wheel
lines.zh: 我觉得在这样疯狂的世界里，有这种感觉是非常 正常且健康的 在这里，我们似乎注定要在这个小小的 仓鼠轮 上不停奔跑

lines.en: instead of just like frolicking in nature with cute animals and hunting and gathering.
lines.zh: 而不是像在自然界中与可爱的动物 嬉戏 以及进行狩猎和采集。

lines.en: But we also do deserve to break ourselves out of that loop.
lines.zh: 但我们也确实有资格（值得）去 打破那个循环（跳出局限）。

lines.en: Whoa, that run took me out! It's also so freaking hot;
lines.zh: 哇哦，刚才那趟跑步差点 要了我的命（累死我了）！天气也 热得要命；

lines.en: I never gonna shut up about the heat because this summer is already a scorcher.
lines.zh: 我大概 永远无法停止抱怨这高温 因为今年夏天绝对是个 大火炉。

lines.en: I love weight training, and I love going to the gym, and I love doing all types of strength training.
lines.zh: 我喜欢 力量训练，喜欢去健身房，喜欢做各种类型的 力量训练。

lines.en: And as a kid, I was always taught that that type of training and ballet are not very complementary, and it's really hard for them to coexist.
lines.zh: 而在我小时候，别人总是教导我那种训练和芭蕾其实 并不怎么互补，它们真的 很难共存。

lines.en: And honestly, that's all I can say for why I procrastinated it for so long,
lines.zh: 说实话，这也是我能找出的 为什么我 把它拖延了这么久 的原因，

lines.en: and I need to be in the right headspace of coming in here.
lines.zh: 而且我需要调整到正确的 心态（心理状态） 才能踏进健身房。

lines.en: I want to do a little haul of the rest of the Skims pieces that they sent me.
lines.zh: 我想做一个小小的 开箱分享（购物战利品展示） 是他们寄给我的剩下那些 Skims 单品。

lines.en: The first one is their Fits Everyone square neck bodysuit.
lines.zh: 第一件是他们‘适合所有人’系列的方领 连体紧身衣。

lines.en: When I first tried this on, I was shocked at how comfortable it was.
lines.zh: 当我第一次试穿这件时，它的舒适度让我 大吃一惊。

lines.en: It hugs you in the right places, especially in the waist.
lines.zh: 它完美地 包裹（贴合）了你需要修饰的部位，尤其是腰部。

lines.en: And I love the lower back — how it scoops in the back. It's super flattering.
lines.zh: 而且我超爱下背部的设计——后背那个大 挖空。它超级 凸显身材（显瘦/好看）。

lines.en: I found a scrub that is so soft.
lines.zh: 我找到了一款 极其柔软的磨砂膏。

lines.en: I got sushi on my way home because all that browsing exhausted me.
lines.zh: 回家路上我买了寿司，因为逛了那么久快把我 累瘫了。

lines.en: I swear, shopping is a sport.
lines.zh: 我发誓，逛街绝对是一项体力运动。

lines.en: Kind of fell off the grid last night. I ended up going to watch the Super Bowl with some of Olivia's friends.
lines.zh: 昨晚我有点 “断网（消失/没看手机）” 了。我最后去和Olivia的一些朋友看了超级碗。

lines.en: I was so shattered after the halftime show, I was ready for bed, but I pushed through.
lines.zh: 中场秀结束后我 累得要命（精疲力尽），本想直接睡觉，但我还是 咬牙坚持下来了。

lines.en: It was really nice to be around people that I didn't know.
lines.zh: 和那些 我不认识的人待在一起 感觉真的很棒。

lines.en: It just excites me about life to realize that there's so many people out there that I haven't met yet but that I could potentially get along with.
lines.zh: 这让我 对生活充满激情，因为我意识到外面还有那么多我未曾谋面的人，但我们却极有可能 成为合得来的朋友。

lines.en: Another way I make the most out of my trips is I book hotels in the areas that I want to explore and spend time in.
lines.zh: 另一个让我 充分利用 旅行时间的办法 就是把酒店订在我想要探索和消磨时间的区域。

lines.en: This may seem like a no-brainer, but for years I would book hotels in further out areas of the city to stretch my budget further.
lines.zh: 这看起来像是个 不用过脑子（显而易见）的常识，但多年来我总是把酒店订在城市偏远的地方，为了能让我的 预算撑得更久。

lines.en: If I wanted to be somewhere really early, like for sunrise, I had to think about: is transit even running that early?
lines.zh: 如果我想 一大早就到某个地方，比如去看日出，我就得考虑：那么早有 公共交通在运营时间 吗？

lines.en: Or can I get a cab that early?
lines.zh: 或者那么早能 打到出租车 吗？

lines.en: And I found that I started cutting my days shorter. Like I started going back to the hotel earlier.
lines.zh: 然后我发现我开始 缩短我每天在外的行程。比如我会 更早地回酒店。

lines.en: Because I didn't want to wait until cabs thinned out and I couldn't snag one.
lines.zh: 因为我不想等到出租车 变少（不好打车） 的时候，而我又 抢不到 一辆。

theme: 佛罗伦萨的购物与美景

lines.en: We discovered that as much as Florence holds a lot of history, it is also a shopping city.
lines.zh: 我们发现，尽管佛罗伦萨 承载着厚重的历史，但它 同样也是一座购物之城。

lines.en: All the streets leading to the Duomo and the museums are packed with designer storefronts,
lines.zh: 所有通往大教堂和博物馆的街道上，都 挤满了 设计师品牌的店面，

lines.en: making it almost impossible to glide through the city without making a purchase.
lines.zh: 这让人几乎不可能 在 穿梭于 这座城市时 什么都不买。

lines.en: We enjoyed the most stunning view of Florence. It was picturesque.
lines.zh: 我们欣赏了佛罗伦萨 最 迷人的景色。简直 如诗如画。

lines.en: The view resembled that of a postcard, with the Cathedral of Florence and its iconic huge rust-orange dome standing high.
lines.zh: 那景色 像极了明信片上的风景，佛罗伦萨大教堂及其 标志性的巨大橙红色穹顶 高高耸立。

lines.en: The sight of the city was breathtaking. Afterwards, we went thrifting.
lines.zh: 整个 城市的景象 令人叹为观止。之后，我们去逛了二手店。

lines.en: But I didn't find anything that stood out to me, so I left empty-handed.
lines.zh: 但我没发现什么 特别吸引我 的东西，所以我就 空手而归 了。

theme: 纽约的魅力与偶遇朋友

lines.en: Okay, prime example of why I love New York. When the sun comes out, you just run into friends.
lines.zh: 好吧，这就是我为什么喜欢纽约的 完美范例。只要太阳一出来，你出门就能 偶遇 朋友。

lines.en: “What's up, guys?” This is Harry. I know I say this all the time, but it's interactions like this that make New York City feel like a playground for adults.
lines.zh: “哥们儿，最近怎么样？”这是Harry。我知道我老是这么说，但正是这种 不期而遇的互动 让人觉得纽约就像是 成年人的游乐场。

lines.en: For such a huge city, it is incredibly small and compact at the same time.
lines.zh: 对于这么大的一座城市来说，它同时又 小巧紧凑得令人难以置信。

lines.en: Anyway, Harry and I hung out here unexpectedly for almost an hour.
lines.zh: 总之，Harry和我就在这儿 意外地闲聊了 将近一个小时。

lines.en: We've been friends for like almost 8 years at this point. He's a very good egg.
lines.zh: 算起来我们做朋友 差不多有8年了。他这人真挺 不错的（是个好人/值得信赖的人）。

theme: 心理咨询后的放空与想家

lines.en: I had therapy a couple of days ago, and ever since that therapy session, I've just been catching myself zoning out.
lines.zh: 几天前我去做了一次 心理咨询，自从那次 咨询 结束后，我就一直察觉到自己在走神。

lines.en: Has anyone else experienced this? Some therapy sessions I feel so good after;
lines.zh: 有其他人经历过这种情况吗？有些时候做完心理咨询后我感觉特别好；

lines.en: I'm feeling like I've unpacked a lot of things, but recently it hasn't been like that.
lines.zh: 感觉自己 梳理（卸下）了很多心结，但 最近几次并没有这种感觉。

lines.en: Just kind of been feeling a little homesick,
lines.zh: 就是有点 想家了，

lines.en: wanting to go back home.
lines.zh: 想回家。

theme: 高情商回答面试陷阱问题

lines.en: Question three: What's your greatest weakness? You never want to use a strength as a weakness.
lines.zh: 第三个问题：你 最大的弱点 是什么？你绝对不能 把优点当成弱点来说。

lines.en: So you're never going to be like, "Oh, I am such a perfectionist." Like, we all see through that now.
lines.zh: 所以千万别说，“哦，我太 追求完美了。”因为现在大家都 看透这套说辞了。

lines.en: What you want to do with this one—and it takes some finessing—is give an actual weakness,
lines.zh: 面对这个问题，你应该做的是——这需要一点 说话的艺术（巧妙处理的技巧）——给出一个 真实的弱点，

lines.en: but one that is not directly related to the core skills of this position.
lines.zh: 但这个弱点不能 与你应聘职位的核心技能直接相关。

lines.en: So one of the weaknesses I give a lot is that I am highly opinionated.
lines.zh: 所以我经常提及的 一个 弱点 就是 我这个人非常 容易固执己见（有主见）。

lines.en: I have an opinion on everything, including which fast food restaurant to go to, even though it doesn't really matter to me.
lines.zh: 我对任何事情都有自己的看法，甚至包括去哪家快餐店，尽管这对我来说 其实无所谓。

lines.en: Starting off with the chicken breast, I first put them in a skillet and cooked them a little bit with some olive oil.
lines.zh: 首先从 鸡胸肉 开始，我把它们放进 平底锅 里 倒点橄榄油稍微煎一下。

lines.en: I also put some seasoning on them. After it was cooked, I put them in this little silicone tray holder type thing that we put in our air fryer.
lines.zh: 我还 撒了一些调料。煎熟后，我把它们盛到了这个 可以放进空气炸锅的类似小硅胶托盘的容器里。

lines.en: I 10 out of 10 recommend this because then you don't have to clean the actual air fryer, you just have to clean this silicone tray.
lines.zh: 我 十分（强烈）推荐这种做法，因为这样你就不必去清洗空气炸锅本身了，只需清洗这个 硅胶托盘。

lines.en: I put some marinara pasta sauce on top of the chicken and then sprinkled mozzarella cheese on top of that.
lines.zh: 我在鸡肉上倒了一点 意式番茄大蒜酱，然后在上面 撒了点马苏里拉奶酪。

lines.en: Then I put it in the air fryer and cooked it at 340 degrees for eight minutes.
lines.zh: 然后我 把它放进空气炸锅，以340度烤八分钟。

theme: 失眠焦虑与意外的日出

lines.en: On the morning of February 16th, I experienced insomnia, which is not something I've ever really had to deal with.
lines.zh: 在2月16日早上，我 失眠了，这以前 并不是我经常会面临的问题。

lines.en: I was up at 4:00 and could not fall back asleep for the life of me.
lines.zh: 我在 凌晨4点醒来，并且 死活（无论如何也）无法再次入睡。

lines.en: I was consumed with stress about my essays.
lines.zh: 我被论文 压得喘不过气来（被压力吞噬）。

lines.en: The writer's block for my assignments was real and freaking dazing confused.
lines.zh: 写作业时的 文思枯竭（卡壳） 是 真真切切的，让人极其头晕目眩又抓狂。

lines.en: The silver lining was I got to witness the most mesmerizing sunrise as I sat unable to shut my eyes in the living room.
lines.zh: 唯一 不幸中的万幸（一线希望） 是，当我无法合眼坐在客厅时，我目睹了 最令人着迷的日出景色。

theme: 停止内耗把快乐还给自己

lines.en: I'm someone who needs to share a lot and talk about my feelings in order to feel good on a daily basis.
lines.zh: 我是一个需要 频繁分享并倾诉自己感受的人，只有这样我每天才能 感觉良好。

lines.en: Literally, even if there's nobody around, I will talk out loud. I just find it so liberating.
lines.zh: 毫不夸张地说，即使周围没人，我也会 大声说出来。我觉得这让人极其 如释重负（获得解脱）。

lines.en: I asked myself what I wanted to prioritize during the rest of the summer,
lines.zh: 我问自己，在夏天余下的时间里 我想把什么放在 首位（优先考虑），

lines.en: coming to the conclusion that I am in charge of my own happiness, as cheesy as that may sound.
lines.zh: 得出的结论是，我的幸福由我 做主（负责），尽管这听起来有点老套。

lines.en: This trip helped me learn to prioritize my personal well-being over wanting to please others.
lines.zh: 这次旅行让我学会了 把个人身心健康放在首位，而不是一味地 想去取悦别人。

theme: 警惕社交媒体自动驾驶模式

lines.en: You know the feeling: you have a free moment in your day and as if on autopilot, you find yourself aimlessly reaching for your phone.
lines.zh: 我们都懂那种感觉：你在一天中刚好有片刻空闲，然后就像开启了 自动驾驶模式 一样，你发现自己 漫无目的地伸手去拿手机。

lines.en: Social media dominates our lives, and it's no coincidence.
lines.zh: 社交媒体主宰着我们的生活，而这绝非巧合。

lines.en: Post after post, our brain is exposed to so much information and a skewed view of reality,
lines.zh: 一个又一个的帖子，我们的大脑 接触到了海量的信息 和一种 被扭曲的现实观，

lines.en: reducing our self-esteem, magnifying unrealistic comparisons,
lines.zh: 这 降低了我们的自尊，放大了不切实际的攀比，

lines.en: stealing our attention spans.
lines.zh: 并且 窃取了我们的注意力持续时间。

theme: 行动力是摆脱低谷的唯一解

lines.en: I should give you guys a little rundown of my day.
lines.zh: 我应该给你们 简要汇报 一下我的一天。

lines.en: I've kind of been in a rut the past few days and I get like really in a funk.
lines.zh: 最近几天我一直 陷入低谷 而且我感觉真的 情绪很差。

lines.en: Sometimes I just feel really unmotivated to do things.
lines.zh: 有时候我就是觉得 真的非常 缺乏动力 去做事。

lines.en: The only way for me to really get out of it is to force myself into doing things.
lines.zh: 唯一能让我真正 摆脱这种状态 的方法 就是 强迫自己去做事情。

lines.en: So on today's agenda I have to run a few errands.
lines.zh: 所以在今天的日程安排里 我得去 跑腿办几件事。

lines.en: I first tried transitioning within the company.
lines.zh: 我首先尝试 在公司内部转岗。

lines.en: It's very bureaucratic and a lot of politics to navigate.
lines.zh: 这个过程非常 官僚（繁琐） 而且要应对很多 职场政治。

lines.en: My CEO was supportive of the move, but he deferred to HR.
lines.zh: 我的CEO支持这个决定 但他把事情 推给了 HR。

lines.en: Then the HR exec was like, "I'm supportive, but there isn't any headcount."
lines.zh: 然后HR主管就说 “我支持，但目前没有 人员编制（空缺）。”

lines.en: And my manager at the time yelled at me for even bringing this up. She said I was selfish, I was unprofessional, I don't think of the team.
lines.zh: 而我当时的经理甚至 因为我提这事而吼我。她说我自私 不专业 不为团队着想。

lines.en: She was like, "You're burning this bridge by trying to leave." So then transferring for me was a no-go.
lines.zh: 她那意思是，“你想走，就是在 过河拆桥（自绝后路）。”所以在那之后转岗对我来说就 彻底没戏 了。

lines.en: First, I will be eating breakfast, and then I will head out on my daily mission.
lines.zh: 首先，我要吃个早餐 然后 出门执行我的日常任务。

lines.en: In today's video, I thought that I would attempt to get over my fear of embarrassment.
lines.zh: 在今天的视频里，我想尝试 克服我对“社死（尴尬）”的恐惧。

lines.en: Because although I am a vlogger, a YouTuber, a content creator, it's kind of something you have to do, you know, vlog outside.
lines.zh: 因为虽然我是个博主 YouTuber 内容创作者 但在外面拍视频 也是 你必须得做的事，在外面拍Vlog。

lines.en: But that also brings me immense fear.
lines.zh: 但这同时也会给我带来 巨大的恐惧感。

lines.en: But I thought today I would do things that really horrify me and you know, make me want to curl into a ball and never leave my house,
lines.zh: 但我想今天我要去做一些 真正 让我感到害怕 的事 那些让我恨不得 缩成一团 永远不出门的事，

lines.en: which aren't really things that are that crazy.
lines.zh: 其实那些事 也并没有多疯狂。

lines.en: I also decided that maybe I'll bring a selfie stick.
lines.zh: 我还决定 也许我该带个 自拍杆。

lines.en: We shared burrata to start, which was drizzled with olive oil, and both got pizzas as mains, which were fantastic.
lines.zh: 我们先点了份 布拉塔奶酪做前菜 上面淋了橄榄油 然后都点了披萨当主菜 味道 绝了。

lines.en: The crust was so chewy; it was delectable.
lines.zh: 披萨饼皮特别 有嚼劲 极其 美味。

lines.en: I was actually filled to the brim, so I got a certain someone to carry me part of the way home.
lines.zh: 我吃得真的是 撑到嗓子眼 了 所以我找了某个人 背了我一段路回家。

lines.en: It was either that or someone was rolling me all the way home.
lines.zh: 要么这样 要么就得有人一路把我 “滚”回家 了。

lines.en: Their cinnamon buns are out of this world. Henry tried this chocolate pastry that was so gorgeous and so decadent.
lines.zh: 他们家的肉桂卷简直 好吃到升天。Henry尝了这个巧克力点心 看起来超华丽 口感极度 奢靡（浓郁诱人）。

lines.en: For dinner, we went to this Italian restaurant, which was a bit of a faux pas.
lines.zh: 晚饭时，我们去了这家意大利餐厅 结果有点 踩雷（失误/不得体）。

lines.en: The vibe was really lovely, but our main courses weren't great.
lines.zh: 氛围确实很讨喜 但我们的 主菜不太行。

lines.en: Drinks, however, were mega-sized, and the dessert was succulent.
lines.zh: 不过饮料 超级大杯 而且甜点非常 多汁美味。

lines.en: Something has just been in the air, and I don't like to lean into things like,
lines.zh: 最近总感觉 有些不对劲 但我不喜欢 过度相信这种说法：

lines.en: "Oh my God, Mercury's in retrograde," because I feel like if you see those things, you just immediately like, "Oh well, I'm gonna have a bad few weeks."
lines.zh: “天哪，我在水逆，”因为我感觉一旦你看了这些东西 你就会立刻想 “好吧，我接下来几周会 过得很糟糕。”

lines.en: For the past, potentially like, six weeks, I just feel like I've kind of been on autopilot, going through the motions.
lines.zh: 在过去大概六周里 我感觉自己一直在 自动驾驶（按部就班地生活） 机械地应付每一天。

lines.en: I just kind of feel like something hasn't really been clicking.
lines.zh: 总感觉事情 有些 不太对劲（没有步入正轨）。

lines.en: However, I do now feel like I'm settled. I feel like I'm ready to get back to my goals, I’m really kind of like tunnel vision in on them.
lines.zh: 不过，现在感觉我已经安定下来了。准备 重新投身于我的目标 并且真的像 隧道视野般（心无旁骛地）专注在它们上面。

theme: 睡前复盘与晚间仪式感

lines.en: The success of the day starts the night before.
lines.zh: 一天的成功 要从 前一天晚上开始。

lines.en: So at night, I like to look at the day and think, "What did I not get done that I can bring over to tomorrow?"
lines.zh: 所以在晚上，我喜欢 回顾当天 并思考 “我有哪些没完成的任务 可以 挪到明天做？”

lines.en: I love making tea at night to wind down and munch on some dark chocolate.
lines.zh: 我喜欢在晚上泡杯茶 来 放松身心 再 嚼点 黑巧克力。

lines.en: Tonight, I am totally eating this cookie my mom got for me,
lines.zh: 今晚，我绝对要 吃掉妈妈给我的这块饼干，

lines.en: but I usually have healthy-ish tasteful desserts at night to savor my sweet tooth.
lines.zh: 但我晚上通常会吃些 相对健康且 美味的甜点 来 满足我嗜甜的味蕾。

theme: 运动的真正意义与情绪价值

lines.en: I used to only see exercise as being something about physically changing the look of my body.
lines.zh: 过去我一直把运动 视为仅仅是改变 外貌体型 的一种方式。

lines.en: When I say exercise for appearance purposes never lasts.
lines.zh: 我说单纯为了 外貌而运动 是无法长久的。

lines.en: You'll lose motivation, you'll constantly be comparing your body, and thinking poorly of yourself because it's normal for your body to fluctuate in weight day to day, month to month.
lines.zh: 你会 失去动力 会不断拿自己的身材和别人比较 并且 看低自己 因为身体的体重日复一日、月复一月地 波动 是很正常的。

lines.en: So if you're constantly looking for physical change, you end up feeling kind of unfulfilled.
lines.zh: 因此，如果你一直 只追求外在的改变 最终总会感到一丝 不满足（失落）。

lines.en: I know personally, whenever I'm feeling anxious or a little moody, going for even just a light walk outside helps me feel so much better.
lines.zh: 就我个人而言 每当我感到 焦虑或心情有点糟糕 时 哪怕只是 在外面散个步 都会感觉好多了。

lines.en: Working out in the sunshine naturally increases your serotonin, which is a hormone that affects your mood.
lines.zh: 在阳光下锻炼 会自然提高体内的 血清素 这是一种能 影响心情 的激素。

lines.en: Exercise itself also produces endorphins, which overall boosts your mood and reduces stress.
lines.zh: 运动本身也会产生 内啡肽 从而整体上 改善你的心情并减轻压力。

theme: 与压力和解的思维转换

lines.en: Stress isn't the real enemy, but our perception of it is.
lines.zh: 压力并不是真正的敌人 我们对压力的 认知（看法） 才是。

lines.en: If we believe stress is harmful, it often will be. It's kind of like a self-fulfilling prophecy.
lines.zh: 如果我们认为压力有害 它往往就会有害 这就像是一个 自我实现的预言。

lines.en: But by simply reframing how we view stress, we can change the whole biological response.
lines.zh: 但只要简单地 改变看待压力的方式 我们就能改变整个 生理反应。

lines.en: Instead of seeing the stress as something that's hindering me, I tell myself, "You found a challenge, but you're excited about this, you've got this."
lines.zh: 我不再把压力 视为 阻碍我的东西 而是告诉自己 “你遇到了挑战 但你对此充满激情 你 搞得定。”

lines.en: It's a small mindset shift, but it's been transformative.
lines.zh: 这只是心态上的微小 转变 但它带来了 颠覆性的改变。

lines.en: Stress has gone from being something that consumed and controlled me to now actually being an ally.
lines.zh: 压力已经从曾经 消耗并控制我的东西 变成了现在真正的 盟友。

theme: 周末大扫除与清理思绪

lines.en: I'm doing it one room at a time because I feel like that makes it a lot more manageable.
lines.zh: 我一次只打扫 一个房间 因为我觉得这样会好 处理（容易搞定） 得多。

lines.en: The job today is the bedroom. It's actually never been this messy just because I've been chucking clothes everywhere.
lines.zh: 今天的任务是打扫卧室。其实它从来没这么乱过 都是因为我一直 到处乱扔衣服。

lines.en: I think just this weekend, I wasn't really all fussed about cleaning or anything. I just wanted to have a chilled, nice weekend celebrating Mom's birthday.
lines.zh: 我觉得就在这个周末 我其实并不怎么 想费心于 打扫卫生之类的 我只想过个 轻松愉快的周末 庆祝妈妈的生日。

lines.en: Okay, let's give it a go. I've dusted down this. The amount of dust that accumulates in here is really insane.
lines.zh: 行，咱们 开始干活吧。我已经把这儿 掸去灰尘（除尘） 了。这里积攒的灰尘量 真的太 夸张了。

lines.en: So I've dusted all of this, I've put a load of laundry in, and look how much dust I got from scraping the carpet.
lines.zh: 所以我清理了个遍 我 把一堆衣服扔进洗衣机 然后看我从 刮地毯 刮下来多少灰啊。

lines.en: I feel like I've definitely made some headway today.
lines.zh: 我觉得今天的打扫 确实 取得了些实质性进展。

theme: 极简晨间日常与重拾爱好

lines.en: My skincare routine these mornings have been ultra-simple.
lines.zh: 我最近早上的 护肤流程 超级 简单。

lines.en: I usually just don't do anything, or the most I'll do is splash my face with some cold water.
lines.zh: 我通常什么都不做 或者最多就是 用冷水洗一下脸。

lines.en: These days, I've also started carving out time in the morning to practice music
lines.zh: 这些天，我还开始在早上 挤出（专门留出）时间 练习音乐

lines.en: because living with a family where everyone loves to sing and plays an instrument has really reignited my appreciation for music.
lines.zh: 因为生活在一个家庭里 大家庭里人人都爱唱歌和演奏乐器 这真的 重新点燃了我对音乐的热爱。

lines.en: I used to take piano lessons as a kid, but it felt way more like a chore than enjoyment.
lines.zh: 我小时候上过钢琴课 但那时感觉它更像一项 苦差事 而不是 享受。

lines.en: After having breakfast and those hours of pure enjoyment, I hop into work.
lines.zh: 吃完早餐 享受了那 纯粹的享受时光 后 我就 投入工作 了。

theme: 将枯燥的学习生活浪漫化

lines.en: During the school year, I used to feel so stressed and overwhelmed all the time.
lines.zh: 在上学期间，我过去总是感到压力山大、不堪重负 一直是这样。

lines.en: I was always telling myself, "I'm so over it, there's no way I'm getting through another semester."
lines.zh: 我总是告诉自己，“我 真是受够了，我不可能再 熬过 另一个学期了。”

lines.en: So, I shifted my mindset and understood that school was something I was going to get through,
lines.zh: 之后，我 改变了心态 明白了上学是我终究要熬过去的必经之路，

lines.en: which made me put energy into how I could enjoy it.
lines.zh: 这让我把精力投入到 如何能享受它 上。

lines.en: So, in this video, I'm going to show you how I romanticized school,
lines.zh: 所以，在这个视频中，我会向大家展示我是如何将学校生活 浪漫化 的，

lines.en: which helped me to get better grades, enjoy learning, and made me feel excited for the next semester.
lines.zh: 这帮我取得了更好的成绩，使我享受学习，并让我对接下来的学期感到 兴奋。

lines.en: I love essay collections because they're kind of easy to pick up;
lines.zh: 我喜欢散文集，因为它们很容易 随手翻阅；

lines.en: you feel satisfied with almost minimal effort.
lines.zh: 你几乎不费 吹灰之力 就能感到满足。

lines.en: Thus they make for the perfect morning read in the sun
lines.zh: 因此，它们是阳光下完美的晨读选择。

lines.en: I'm kind of happy that I discovered it at this stage of my life because it really goes into the contradictions and all the feelings of being in your mid-late 20s.
lines.zh: 我很庆幸在人生的这个阶段发现了这本书，因为它真的深入 探讨了 那些矛盾 以及在 二十五六岁 时会经历的所有感受。

lines.en: The essays kind of center around living alone, love, intimacy, loneliness,
lines.zh: 这些散文主要 围绕着 独居、爱情、亲密关系、孤独等话题展开，

lines.en: and there's a couple of essays that really spoke to me because they go into ideas of heritage and culture.
lines.zh: 其中有几篇散文真的 触动了我（引起了我的共鸣），因为它们探讨了 传承和文化 的概念。

lines.en: You have nobody to impress but yourself. If a certain person doesn't like you, okay. And if a guy didn't text you back, okay.
lines.zh: 你不需要 取悦任何人，除了你自己。如果有人不喜欢你，没关系。如果有男生不回你消息，也没关系。

lines.en: You don't need their validation because you validate yourself.
lines.zh: 你不需要他们的 认可，因为你 自己就能认可自己。

lines.en: You love every part of you, your flaws, your strengths.
lines.zh: 你爱 自己的每一个部分，包括你的 缺点 和你的 优点。

lines.en: And in that state, you attract things naturally to you. People will be drawn to that positive energy.
lines.zh: 在那种状态下，你会自然而然地 吸引事物来到你身边。人们会被那种正能量所 吸引。

lines.en: And if someone disrespects you, it's because they have problems themselves. It's merely a projection of their own insecurities.
lines.zh: 如果有人不尊重你，那是因为他们自己有问题。这仅仅是他们 内心不安全感的投射 而已。

lines.en: It took me a good 2 years to figure out what exercises I enjoyed doing and what made my body feel good.
lines.zh: 我花了 足足两年的时间才弄清楚 自己喜欢什么运动 以及哪种运动能让我的身体感觉舒适。

lines.en: For example, I know that I'm not a runner, I'm more of a walker.
lines.zh: 比如说，我发现自己并不是跑步爱好者，我更喜欢 散步。

lines.en: So instead of forcing myself to do that intense, high-level cardio of running, I find it a lot more maintainable to go on longer walks every day.
lines.zh: 因此，与其强迫自己去做跑步那种剧烈、高强度的 有氧运动，我觉得每天进行较长时间的散步 要 容易坚持 得多。

lines.en: That's not to say that one day I might get into running, because I think it's so fun to switch up your workout routine.
lines.zh: 当然，这并不是说 我有一天不会 迷上 跑步，因为我觉得 改变（切换） 运动习惯挺有意思的。

lines.en: But the point I'm trying to make is it's up to you on what kind of exercises you do to feel active.
lines.zh: 但 我想表达的重点 是 究竟选择哪种运动方式，完全 取决于你自己 觉得哪种运动让你感觉有活力。

lines.en: My first kind of lesson of this year was that I finally fell in love with moving my body.
lines.zh: 我今年的第一个收获是 我终于 爱上了运动。

lines.en: I tried different home workout challenges, programs, at-home yoga, I had a personal trainer, I had a gym membership.
lines.zh: 我尝试过各种 居家锻炼挑战、健身项目、在家做瑜伽，我请过 私教，办过 健身房会员。

lines.en: It was honestly just so impossible for me to stick to. Like, it was I always came in little spurts.
lines.zh: 老实说，我真的完全 坚持 不下来。就好像，我总是 三分钟热度（一阵一阵的）。

lines.en: I was really excited, and then I completely fell off.
lines.zh: 一开始我很兴奋，然后就彻底 放弃了。

lines.en: And I finally figured it out this year, and it's honestly been probably the most gratifying part of my year.
lines.zh: 但今年我终于 摸索出头绪了，老实说这可能是我这一年中最 有成就感的（令人满足的）部分。

lines.en: It's honestly added so much stability to my life. Like, it really builds confidence and discipline.
lines.zh: 运动确实让我的生活更加 稳定。也真的能建立 自信和自律。

lines.en: I am gonna throw on some makeup, and then I guess I'm gonna go out and try and find a nice breakfast spot.
lines.zh: 我打算随便 涂点（迅速化好） 妆，然后我想我会出门 去找一家不错的早餐店。

lines.en: I am really craving some good coffee. I feel like I'm becoming a bit more addicted to coffee.
lines.zh: 我极其 渴望 喝杯好咖啡。我感觉自己对咖啡越来越 上瘾了。

lines.en: It's not that I need the energy boost. I don't really even notice that it gives me any energy boosts.
lines.zh: 倒不是因为我需要 提神（精力补充）。我甚至都没怎么感觉到它能给我带来什么精力提升。

lines.en: It's more the fact that it's just so cozy. Like having a morning coffee, you have something to be excited about.
lines.zh: 更多是因为那种感觉实在太 惬意了。就像每天早晨喝杯咖啡，能让你对新的一天有所 期待。

lines.en: But I've had some suspicion that I might be addicted to coffee from the fact that I actually make instant coffee at hotel rooms.
lines.zh: 但我有点 怀疑 自己可能是真的对咖啡上瘾了，毕竟我居然连在酒店房间里都会去冲 速溶咖啡。

lines.en: Hello, hello, about to go take a Pilates class. It's just been the highlight of my day.
lines.zh: 哈喽，哈喽，正准备去上普拉提课。这绝对是我今天最期待的时刻（高光时刻）。

lines.en: Morning I am on my way to a Pilates class. I pinched my foot on the reformer machine, and my foot is bruised.
lines.zh: 我正在去普拉提课的路上。我在普拉提核心床上 夹到 了脚，现在我的脚 淤青了。

lines.en: I was already scheduled for this Pilates class, and I don't want to pay for a cancellation.
lines.zh: 我已经预约了这节普拉提课，而且我不想 交取消预约的罚金。

lines.en: So, here I am, going strong, making it to my class.
lines.zh: 所以，我就来这儿了，坚强面对，赶来上我的课。

lines.en: I kid you not. I had the best sleep of my life on this bed last night. I slept like a rock.
lines.zh: 不开玩笑。昨晚我在这张床上睡了这辈子最好的一觉，我 睡得死死的。

lines.en: So my plan for the rest of the day is I'm gonna go and journal a little bit more, set my intentions for this week.
lines.zh: 所以今天余下时间的计划是 我打算再多写点日记，设定一下 这周的目标。

lines.en: The purpose of my think week was to dedicate time solely to my craft, to ruminate on complex ideas and questions.
lines.zh: 我设立“思考周”的目的 是 为了把时间完全 用在自己的作品上，沉思那些复杂的想法和问题。

lines.en: Coming here, I was feeling a bit stretched thin and felt like a million things needed my attention at all times.
lines.zh: 来到这里，我感觉有些 分身乏术 感觉时时刻刻都有 无数的事情 需要我关注。

lines.en: And while it's normal to have the distractions of everyday life, I felt like maybe I just needed some time to zoom out and think.
lines.zh: 虽然日常生活中分心很正常，但我感觉或许我只是需要一些时间 跳出来 思考一下。

lines.en: In December, just one random day, I decided to go drive out and go apartment-hunting, not expecting to find anything.
lines.zh: 在 12 月某个寻常的一天，我决定开车出去 找找房子，心里没抱任何期待。

lines.en: I was pretty open to anything. I did have a few non-negotiables.
lines.zh: 我能接受各种条件。但我确实有几个 没得商量的硬性要求。

lines.en: One of them, of course, being a good and natural lighting. This is the top priority.
lines.zh: 其中之一当然是 必须有极好的 自然采光。这是 重中之重。

lines.en: I was hoping that my next apartment would have recreational amenities, like having a gym in the building would be so cool.
lines.zh: 我希望新公寓里能有 娱乐休闲配套设施，比如楼里能有个 健身房 的话就太赞了。

lines.en: I wanted the apartment to have an in-unit washer plus dryer. This time I wanted to move into a place that was walking distance to grocery stores, cafes, etc.
lines.zh: 还希望公寓能自带 独立的洗衣机和烘干机。这次我想搬到一个 步行就能到 杂货店、咖啡馆等地方的住处。

lines.en: Big windows with a pretty view were a must.
lines.zh: 能看到 美景 的大窗户也是 必不可少的。

lines.en: I'll be honest, I do not like waking up at 5 am.
lines.zh: 老实说，我不喜欢 早上 5 点起床。

lines.en: But the warmer it gets and the closer we are to summer, the easier I find it to wake up early.
lines.zh: 但天气 越暖和 离 夏天越近，我就越容易早起。

lines.en: It's almost as if with every ray of sunshine dancing throughout the sky, my batteries are filling up again and I'm so much more motivated.
lines.zh: 就好像 当每一缕阳光洒满天空，我的 电量也随之再次满格 我整个人也变得更加 有动力了。

lines.en: We all have days where we barely get out of bed. We rush through the steps within a routine that we do, most necessary, and out of the door we go.
lines.zh: 我们都有过 那种 赖在床上根本起不来 的日子。我们 匆匆忙忙地走完 日常事项中最必要的步骤，然后就出门了。

lines.en: And there's nothing wrong with that.
lines.zh: 这 并没有什么错。

lines.en: But for my own mental and also physical health, I find a structured morning routine that I can stick to on most days highly beneficial.
lines.zh: 但对我的 精神和身体健康 来说，我觉得一个我能坚持执行的、有条理的晨间日程 在大多数日子里，是 大有裨益的。

theme: 基础款穿搭与点睛首饰

lines.en: These are my new additions, and they're a little bit different from most of my other jewelry, which is usually plain gold.
lines.zh: 这些是我的 新添置品，它们和我大多数其他首饰有点不一样，那些通常都是 素金 的。

lines.en: I have a couple of pieces here which have these beautiful black spinel beads, which contrast with the gold nuggets.
lines.zh: 我这里有 几件 镶嵌了漂亮的黑尖晶石珠，和金块形成了 对比。

lines.en: And I've mentioned before that I love gold jewelry worn against or worn with black clothing.
lines.zh: 我 之前提到过 我喜欢金色首饰 搭配 黑色衣服来穿戴。

lines.en: And I think these are really beautiful pieces which I'll be using for day-to-day wear, perhaps to amp up my basics,
lines.zh: 我觉得这些都是很漂亮的单品 我会把它们作为 日常佩戴，也许可以用来 提升我基础款的质感，

lines.en: so maybe wearing with a basic shirt or even a basic vest or t-shirt and then layering over a blazer on top, which is very much a go-to outfit of mine throughout the spring season.
lines.zh: 所以可以搭配一件基础款衬衫 甚至是一件基础款马甲或T恤 然后在外面 叠穿 一件西装外套，这非常是我在整个春季的 首选穿搭。

theme: 数字戒断与有意识社交

lines.en: I’ve been not on my phone. I have been like putting off going on my phone.
lines.zh: 我最近一直 没看手机。我一直在刻意 推迟 玩手机的时间。

lines.en: Like it will get like 10 a.m. and I'll just think, Oh, I don't even want to pick it up
lines.zh: 比如说到了早上10点，我就会想，哦，我甚至都不想 拿起它

lines.en: because I've been having such like productive, clear, positive mornings without all of the kind of external noise that comes from your phone.
lines.zh: 因为我度过了极其 高效、头脑清晰又积极的早晨 完全没有手机带来的那种 外界噪音干扰。

lines.en: I do not think social media is a bad thing at all. I think it could be a really positive inspirational thing.
lines.zh: 我压根不觉得社交媒体 是件坏事。我认为它可能是一件非常 积极、能给人带来启发的事物。

lines.en: I think it can make you feel connected to others. I think there are so many, so many benefits.
lines.zh: 我觉得它能让你感觉到 与他人的联结。我认为它有 太多太多的好处 了。

lines.en: You can learn loads, you can get so much inspiration. But I do think we need to be so much more careful with when we choose to consume social media rather than it being on auto.
lines.zh: 你可以 学到很多，你可以获得大量的灵感。但我确实认为我们需要更加谨慎 选择何时去 消费社交媒体 而不是让它变成一种 自动行为。

lines.en: Now only reason I really remember it (this book) / is just because it's so like bright and neon.
lines.zh: 我真正记得这本书的唯一原因 / 就是因为它封面太 鲜亮夺目 了。

lines.en: It's basically about navigating life in your young 20s and 30s.
lines.zh: 它主要讲了如何在二三十岁青年时期 掌控人生。

lines.en: I want to join a book club or something / because I feel like that's how I like stay on top of reading.
lines.zh: 我有点想加入读书俱乐部或者类似的组织 / 因为我感觉那样我才能 保持高效的阅读习惯。

lines.en: The last book club I was in with my friend ended / because I was the weak link. / I didn't do my readings on time.
lines.zh: 上次我和朋友一起参加的读书俱乐部黄了，/ 因为我是那个 拖后腿的（薄弱环节）。/ 我 没能按时读完 规定的内容。
